<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="fr">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Football Insights — Scout. Project. Decide.</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Oswald:wght@400;500;600;700&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600&family=DM+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root {
  --navy: #f5f2ee;
  --navy-mid: #ede9e3;
  --navy-card: #ffffff;
  --navy-light: #e8e3db;
  --yellow: #f5a623;
  --yellow-dim: #e8892a;
  --brand-pink: #e8357a;
  --brand-purple: #8b3fc8;
  --brand-orange: #f5a623;
  --brand-grad: linear-gradient(135deg, #e8357a 0%, #8b3fc8 45%, #f5a623 100%);
  --brand-grad-h: linear-gradient(90deg, #e8357a 0%, #8b3fc8 50%, #f5a623 100%);
  --white: #0d1b2e;
  --grey: #7a8a99;
  --grey-light: #5a6a7a;
  --font-display: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
  --font-body: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
  --font-mono: 'DM Mono', monospace;
}

*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

body {
  background: var(--navy);
  color: var(--white);
  font-family: var(--font-body);
  font-weight: 300;
  overflow-x: hidden;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

/* ── LANGUAGE TOGGLE ── */
.lang-toggle {
  position: fixed;
  top: 22px; right: 28px;
  z-index: 1000;
  display: flex;
  gap: 4px;
  background: rgba(245,242,238,0.95);
  border: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.12);
  border-radius: 30px;
  padding: 4px;
  backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}
.lang-toggle button {
  background: none;
  border: none;
  color: #7a8a99;
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  padding: 5px 14px;
  border-radius: 24px;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.2s;
}
.lang-toggle button.active {
  background: var(--yellow);
  color: var(--navy);
  font-weight: 600;
}

/* ── NAV ── */
nav {
  position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
  z-index: 900;
  padding: 10px 6%;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(245,242,238,0.97) 0%, rgba(245,242,238,0) 100%);
  backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.08);
}
.nav-logo {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
  text-decoration: none;
  overflow: visible;
}
.logo-icon {
  width: 36px; height: 36px;
  background: var(--yellow);
  border-radius: 50%;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  font-size: 18px;
}
.logo-text {
  font-family: var(--font-display);
  font-size: 1.35rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  color: var(--white);
}
.logo-text span { color: var(--yellow); }
.nav-links {
  display: flex; gap: 32px;
  list-style: none;
}
.nav-links a {
  color: #5a6a7a;
  text-decoration: none;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  transition: color 0.2s;
}
.nav-links a:hover { color: var(--yellow); }
.nav-logo-text {
  font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
  font-size: 1.2rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  line-height: 1.3;
  padding-bottom: 2px;
  background: var(--brand-grad);
  -webkit-background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
  background-clip: text;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.nav-cta {
  background: var(--brand-grad);
  color: var(--navy);
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  padding: 10px 22px;
  border-radius: 4px;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: opacity 0.2s;
}
.nav-cta:hover { opacity: 0.85; }

/* ── HERO ── */
#hero {
  min-height: 100vh;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 120px 6% 80px;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.hero-bg {
  position: absolute; inset: 0;
  background: 
    radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 80% at 75% 50%, rgba(232,53,122,0.06) 0%, transparent 70%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse 40% 40% at 20% 80%, rgba(139,63,200,0.05) 0%, transparent 60%);
}
.hero-grid {
  position: absolute; inset: 0;
  background-image: 
    linear-gradient(rgba(13,27,46,0.04) 1px, transparent 1px),
    linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(13,27,46,0.04) 1px, transparent 1px);
  background-size: 60px 60px;
  mask-image: radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 70% at 50% 50%, black 0%, transparent 100%);
}
.hero-content { position: relative; z-index: 2; }
.hero-tag {
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.15em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  background: var(--brand-grad);
  -webkit-background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
  background-clip: text;
  margin-bottom: 24px;
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
}
.hero-tag::before {
  content: '';
  display: block; width: 28px; height: 2px;
  background: var(--brand-grad-h);
}
.hero-title {
  font-family: var(--font-display);
  font-size: clamp(2.8rem, 6vw, 5.5rem);
  line-height: 0.95;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  margin-bottom: 28px;
}
.hero-title .accent { background: var(--brand-grad); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; }
.hero-sub {
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  color: #5a6a7a;
  max-width: 480px;
  margin-bottom: 48px;
  line-height: 1.7;
  font-weight: 300;
}
.hero-sub em { color: var(--white); font-style: normal; font-weight: 500; }
.hero-actions { display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: center; }
.btn-primary {
  background: var(--brand-grad);
  color: var(--navy);
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  padding: 14px 32px;
  border-radius: 4px;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: all 0.25s;
  display: inline-block;
}
.btn-primary:hover { opacity:0.88; background: var(--brand-grad); transform: translateY(-2px); }
.btn-ghost {
  color: #5a6a7a;
  font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  text-decoration: none;
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
  transition: color 0.2s;
}
.btn-ghost:hover { color: var(--yellow); }
.btn-ghost::after { content: '→'; }
.hero-visual { position: relative; z-index: 2; display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; }
.hero-card {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--navy-card) 0%, var(--navy-mid) 100%);
  border: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.1);
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 32px;
  width: 380px;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(13,27,46,0.1);
}
.hero-card::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute; top: -1px; left: 20px; right: 20px; height: 2px;
  background: var(--brand-grad-h);
}
.hc-label {
  font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.65rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase;
  background: var(--brand-grad); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; margin-bottom: 8px;
}
.hc-player { font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 4px; }
.hc-team { font-size: 0.8rem; color: #7a8a99; font-family: var(--font-mono); margin-bottom: 24px; }
.hc-level-label { font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--grey); margin-bottom: 4px; }
.hc-level-title { font-size: 1rem; color: var(--white); font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 20px; }
.stat-row { margin-bottom: 10px; }
.stat-row-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 4px; }
.stat-name { font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--grey); font-family: var(--font-mono); }
.stat-val { font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--yellow); font-family: var(--font-mono); font-weight: 500; }
.stat-bar { height: 3px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 2px; overflow: hidden; }
.stat-fill { height: 100%; border-radius: 2px; background: var(--brand-grad-h); animation: fillBar 1.5s ease-out forwards; }
@keyframes fillBar { from { width: 0 !important; } }
.hc-divider { height: 1px; background: rgba(13,27,46,0.08); margin: 20px 0; }
.hc-projection { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; }
.hc-proj-icon { font-size: 1.2rem; }
.hc-proj-text { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--grey-light); }
.hc-proj-text strong { color: var(--yellow); }
.hero-stats {
  display: flex; gap: 48px; margin-top: 60px;
}
.hero-stat-item {}
.hero-stat-num {
  font-family: var(--font-display);
  font-size: 2.8rem;
  background: var(--brand-grad); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text;
  line-height: 1;
}
.hero-stat-label {
  font-size: 0.72rem; color: #7a8a99;
  font-family: var(--font-mono); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  margin-top: 4px;
}

/* ── SECTION BASE ── */
section { padding: 100px 6%; }
.section-tag {
  font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.7rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase;
  background: var(--brand-grad); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; margin-bottom: 16px;
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
}
.section-tag::before { content: ''; display: block; width: 20px; height: 1px; background: var(--brand-grad-h); }
.section-title {
  font-family: var(--font-display);
  font-size: clamp(1.9rem, 3.5vw, 3.2rem);
  line-height: 1.05; letter-spacing: 0.03em;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
}
.section-lead {
  font-size: 1rem; color: #5a6a7a;
  max-width: 560px; line-height: 1.75; font-weight: 300;
}

/* ── PROBLEMS ── */
#problems { background: var(--navy); }
.problems-grid {
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 32px; margin-top: 64px;
}
.problem-card {
  background: var(--navy-card);
  border: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.06);
  border-radius: 10px; padding: 36px;
  position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  transition: border-color 0.3s;
}
.problem-card:hover { border-color: rgba(232,53,122,0.3); box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(13,27,46,0.06); }
.problem-card::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 2px;
  background: var(--brand-grad-h);
  opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.3s;
}
.problem-card:hover::after { opacity: 1; }
.problem-num {
  font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 4rem;
  color: rgba(13,27,46,0.07); line-height: 1;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
}
.problem-title { font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 10px; }
.problem-title span { color: var(--yellow); }
.problem-text { font-size: 0.88rem; color: #5a6a7a; line-height: 1.7; }
.problems-answer {
  margin-top: 48px;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(245,200,0,0.12) 0%, rgba(245,200,0,0.04) 100%);
  border: 1px solid rgba(245,200,0,0.3);
  border-radius: 10px; padding: 32px 40px;
  text-align: center;
}
.problems-answer p {
  font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.8rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em; color: var(--white);
}
.problems-answer p span { color: var(--yellow); }

/* ── HOW IT WORKS ── */
#how { background: #ede9e3; }
.how-grid {
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  gap: 1px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
  border: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.06);
  border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden;
  margin-top: 64px;
}
.how-item {
  background: #ffffff; padding: 40px 32px;
  position: relative; transition: background 0.3s;
}
.how-item:hover { background: #f0ece6; border-left: 3px solid var(--brand-pink); }
.how-icon { font-size: 2rem; margin-bottom: 20px; }
.how-title { font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 10px; }
.how-text { font-size: 0.83rem; color: #5a6a7a; line-height: 1.7; }
.how-number {
  position: absolute; top: 20px; right: 24px;
  font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.65rem;
  color: rgba(232,53,122,0.3); letter-spacing: 0.1em;
}

/* ── PLATFORM ── */
#platform { background: var(--navy); }
.platform-layout { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 80px; align-items: center; margin-top: 64px; }
.platform-features { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px; }
.feature-item {
  display: flex; gap: 20px; align-items: flex-start;
  padding: 20px 24px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.06);
  border-radius: 8px;
  transition: border-color 0.3s, background 0.3s;
  cursor: default;
}
.feature-item:hover { border-color: rgba(245,200,0,0.3); background: rgba(245,200,0,0.04); }
.feature-icon {
  width: 40px; height: 40px;
  background: rgba(232,53,122,0.08);
  border-radius: 8px; display: flex;
  align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  font-size: 1.1rem; flex-shrink: 0;
}
.feature-title { font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.95rem; margin-bottom: 4px; }
.feature-desc { font-size: 0.82rem; color: #5a6a7a; line-height: 1.6; }
.platform-visual {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffffff, #f5f0e8);
  border: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.08);
  border-radius: 12px; padding: 40px;
  position: relative;
}
.platform-visual::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute; top: -1px; left: 30px; right: 30px; height: 2px;
  background: var(--brand-grad-h);
}
.pv-label { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--yellow); margin-bottom: 6px; }
.pv-title { font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 4px; }
.pv-sub { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--grey); font-family: var(--font-mono); margin-bottom: 28px; }
.radar-container { display: flex; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 24px; }
svg.radar { width: 200px; height: 200px; }
.pv-bullets { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; }
.pv-bullet { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--grey-light); }
.pv-bullet::before { content: ''; width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--yellow); flex-shrink: 0; }

/* ── PRICING ── */
#pricing { background: #ede9e3; }
.pricing-tabs { display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 48px; margin-top: 40px; }
.tab-btn {
  font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.75rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase;
  padding: 9px 20px; border-radius: 30px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.12);
  background: none; color: var(--grey-light); cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.2s;
}
.tab-btn.active { background: var(--yellow); color: var(--navy); border-color: var(--yellow); font-weight: 600; }
.pricing-panel { display: none; }
.pricing-panel.active { display: block; }
.pricing-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 20px; }
.pricing-card {
  background: var(--navy-card);
  border: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.08);
  border-radius: 12px; padding: 36px 30px;
  position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  transition: transform 0.3s, border-color 0.3s;
}
.pricing-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); border-color: rgba(245,200,0,0.25); }
.pricing-card.featured {
  border-color: var(--brand-pink); box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(232,53,122,0.08);
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f0ece6, #ffffff);
}
.pricing-card.featured::before {
  content: attr(data-badge);
  position: absolute; top: 16px; right: 16px;
  background: var(--brand-grad); color: var(--white);
  font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.6rem;
  font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase;
  padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 20px;
}
.pc-type { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--grey); margin-bottom: 10px; }
.pc-name { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.8rem; letter-spacing: 0.03em; margin-bottom: 12px; }
.pc-desc { font-size: 0.83rem; color: #5a6a7a; line-height: 1.65; margin-bottom: 28px; min-height: 80px; }
.pc-price { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 2.5rem; background: var(--brand-grad); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; line-height: 1; margin-bottom: 4px; }
.pc-period { font-size: 0.75rem; color: #7a8a99; font-family: var(--font-mono); }

/* ── CONTACT ── */
#contact { background: var(--navy); }
.contact-layout { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 80px; align-items: center; margin-top: 64px; }
.contact-info {}
.contact-person {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 36px;
}
.cp-avatar {
  width: 60px; height: 60px; border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--brand-grad);
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.5rem; color: var(--navy);
  font-weight: 700;
}
.cp-name { font-size: 1.15rem; font-weight: 600; }
.cp-role { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--grey); font-family: var(--font-mono); }
.contact-detail { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; margin-bottom: 16px; }
.contact-detail .cd-icon { font-size: 1.1rem; width: 36px; }
.cd-label { font-size: 0.7rem; color: #7a8a99; font-family: var(--font-mono); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; }
.cd-value { font-size: 0.92rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--white); }
.contact-form {
  background: var(--navy-card);
  border: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.08);
  border-radius: 12px; padding: 40px;
}
.form-title { font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 28px; }
.form-group { margin-bottom: 16px; }
.form-group label { display: block; font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--grey); font-family: var(--font-mono); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; margin-bottom: 6px; }
.form-group input, .form-group select, .form-group textarea {
  width: 100%; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
  border: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.1); border-radius: 6px;
  color: #0d1b2e; font-family: var(--font-body); font-size: 0.9rem;
  padding: 10px 14px; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s;
  -webkit-appearance: none;
}
.form-group input:focus, .form-group select:focus, .form-group textarea:focus { border-color: var(--yellow); }
.form-group select option { background: #ffffff; }
.form-group textarea { resize: vertical; min-height: 100px; }
.form-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 12px; }
.btn-submit {
  width: 100%; background: var(--brand-grad); color: var(--white);
  font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase;
  padding: 14px; border: none; border-radius: 6px;
  cursor: pointer; margin-top: 8px; transition: opacity 0.2s;
}
.btn-submit:hover { opacity: 0.85; }

/* ── FOOTER ── */
footer {
  background: #0d1b2e;
  border-top: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.1);
  padding: 40px 6%;
  display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
}
.footer-logo { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.1rem; letter-spacing: 0.06em; color: var(--grey); }
.footer-logo span { color: var(--yellow); }
.footer-logo-text {
  font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
  font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  background: var(--brand-grad);
  -webkit-background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
  background-clip: text;
  margin-bottom: 4px;
}
.footer-tagline { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.68rem; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(13,27,46,0.35); }
.footer-links { display: flex; gap: 24px; }
.footer-links a { font-size: 0.78rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s; }
.footer-links a:hover { color: var(--yellow); }

/* ── ANIMATIONS ── */
.fade-up { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); transition: opacity 0.7s ease, transform 0.7s ease; }
.fade-up.visible { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
.fade-up:nth-child(2) { transition-delay: 0.1s; }
.fade-up:nth-child(3) { transition-delay: 0.2s; }
.fade-up:nth-child(4) { transition-delay: 0.3s; }

/* ── LANG ── */
[data-lang="en"] { display: none; }
body.lang-en [data-lang="fr"] { display: none; }
body.lang-en [data-lang="en"] { display: unset; }
body.lang-en .problems-grid [data-lang="en"],
body.lang-en .how-grid [data-lang="en"],
body.lang-en .pricing-grid [data-lang="en"],
body.lang-en .platform-features [data-lang="en"],
body.lang-en .platform-visual [data-lang="en"] { display: block; }
body.lang-en .section-lead[data-lang="en"],
body.lang-en .section-title[data-lang="en"] { display: block; }

/* keep grid/flex children working when toggling */
.problems-grid > [data-lang],
.how-grid > [data-lang],
.pricing-grid > [data-lang],
.platform-features > [data-lang] { display: none; }
body.lang-en .problems-grid > [data-lang="en"],
body.lang-en .how-grid > [data-lang="en"],
body.lang-en .pricing-grid > [data-lang="en"],
body.lang-en .platform-features > [data-lang="en"] { display: block; }
.problems-grid > [data-lang="fr"],
.how-grid > [data-lang="fr"],
.pricing-grid > [data-lang="fr"],
.platform-features > [data-lang="fr"] { display: block; }

/* Inline text swap  */
.txt { }
body.lang-en .txt-fr { display: none; }
body.lang-fr .txt-en { display: none; }

/* ── SIMULATOR ── */
.sim-wrapper {
  background: var(--navy-card);
  border: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.1);
  border-radius: 14px;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.sim-step { padding: 28px 36px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.06); }
.sim-step-label {
  font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.7rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--grey); margin-bottom: 16px;
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
}
.sim-num {
  background: var(--brand-grad); color: var(--navy);
  font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.65rem;
  width: 20px; height: 20px; border-radius: 50%;
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0;
}
.sim-pills { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 10px; }
.sim-pill {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
  border: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.1);
  color: var(--grey-light); font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-size: 0.78rem; padding: 8px 18px;
  border-radius: 30px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s;
}
.sim-pill:hover { border-color: rgba(245,200,0,0.4); color: var(--white); }
.sim-pill.active { background: var(--brand-grad); color: var(--white); border-color: transparent; font-weight: 600; }
.sim-slider-wrap { padding: 8px 0 20px; }
input[type=range] {
  width: 100%; -webkit-appearance: none;
  height: 3px; background: rgba(13,27,46,0.1);
  border-radius: 2px; outline: none; cursor: pointer;
}
input[type=range]::-webkit-slider-thumb {
  -webkit-appearance: none;
  width: 20px; height: 20px; border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--brand-orange); border: 3px solid var(--navy);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--brand-orange);
}
.sim-slider-ticks { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-top: 10px; }
.sim-tick { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.68rem; color: var(--grey); text-align: center; flex: 1; }
.sim-tick.active { color: var(--yellow); font-weight: 600; }
.sim-checkbox {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
  cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--grey-light);
  padding: 10px 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.08);
  border-radius: 8px; transition: border-color 0.2s;
}
.sim-checkbox:hover { border-color: rgba(245,200,0,0.3); }
.sim-checkbox input { display: none; }
.sim-cb-box {
  width: 18px; height: 18px; border-radius: 4px;
  border: 2px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.15); flex-shrink: 0;
  transition: all 0.2s; position: relative;
}
.sim-checkbox input:checked ~ .sim-cb-box { background: var(--yellow); border-color: var(--yellow); }
.sim-checkbox input:checked ~ .sim-cb-box::after {
  content: '✓'; position: absolute;
  top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%,-50%);
  color: var(--navy); font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700;
}
.sim-checkbox em { color: var(--yellow); font-style: normal; }
.sim-result {
  display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
  padding: 32px 36px;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(232,53,122,0.06), rgba(139,63,200,0.03));
  flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 24px;
}
.sim-result-plan { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.5rem; letter-spacing: 0.03em; margin-bottom: 6px; }
.sim-result-desc { font-size: 0.82rem; color: #5a6a7a; max-width: 440px; line-height: 1.6; }
.sim-result-right { text-align: right; }
.sim-result-price { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 2.8rem; color: var(--yellow); line-height: 1; }
.sim-price-period { font-family: var(--font-body); font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--grey); }
.sim-result-annual { font-size: 0.78rem; color: #7a8a99; font-family: var(--font-mono); margin-top: 4px; }


/* ── STARTER PACK ── */
.starter-pack {
  position: relative;
  background: #111;
  border: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.08);
  border-radius: 16px;
  overflow: hidden;
  padding: 48px;
}
.starter-pack::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute; inset: 0;
  background: var(--brand-grad);
  opacity: 0.06;
  pointer-events: none;
}
.starter-pack::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 2px;
  background: var(--brand-grad-h);
}
.sp-badge {
  display: inline-block;
  font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.68rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase;
  padding: 5px 14px; border-radius: 20px;
  background: rgba(232,53,122,0.12);
  border: 1px solid rgba(232,53,122,0.3);
  color: var(--brand-pink);
  margin-bottom: 32px;
}
.sp-layout {
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 280px; gap: 64px; align-items: start;
}
.sp-title {
  font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 2.4rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em; margin-bottom: 10px;
  background: var(--brand-grad); -webkit-background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text;
}
.sp-tagline { font-size: 1rem; color: #5a6a7a; margin-bottom: 32px; line-height: 1.6; }
.sp-includes { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px; }
.sp-item { display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: flex-start; }
.sp-item-icon {
  width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 8px; flex-shrink: 0;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.08);
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 1rem;
}
.sp-item-title { font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.95rem; margin-bottom: 3px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
.sp-item-desc { font-size: 0.82rem; color: #5a6a7a; line-height: 1.6; }
.sp-tag-reduced {
  font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.6rem; letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 10px;
  background: rgba(245,166,35,0.15); border: 1px solid rgba(245,166,35,0.3);
  color: var(--brand-orange); font-weight: 400;
}
.sp-right {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03);
  border: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.08);
  border-radius: 12px; padding: 32px;
  text-align: center; position: sticky; top: 100px;
}
.sp-value-line {
  font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.72rem;
  color: var(--grey); letter-spacing: 0.06em; margin-bottom: 8px;
}
.sp-strikethrough {
  text-decoration: line-through; color: rgba(13,27,46,0.4);
  margin-left: 4px;
}
.sp-price {
  font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 3.5rem; line-height: 1;
  background: var(--brand-grad); -webkit-background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
}
.sp-ht { font-family: var(--font-body); font-size: 1rem; }
.sp-price-sub { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.68rem; color: var(--grey); letter-spacing: 0.08em; }
.sp-note { font-size: 0.7rem; color: rgba(13,27,46,0.35); margin-top: 14px; font-style: italic; }
@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .sp-layout { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 32px; }
  .starter-pack { padding: 28px; }
}



/* ── DEMO FICHE ── */
.fi-demo-layout {
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 340px; gap: 32px; align-items: start;
}
.fi-report { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; }
.fi-image-wrap {
  position: relative; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 48px rgba(13,27,46,0.12);
  border: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.08);
}
.fi-real-img { width: 100%; display: block; border-radius: 12px; }

/* Light card */
.fi-light .fi-block {
  background: #f0f4f8;
  border: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.1);
  border-radius: 10px; padding: 20px 22px;
  cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s;
  position: relative; outline: none;
  color: #0d1b2e;
}
.fi-light .fi-block:hover {
  border-color: rgba(232,53,122,0.4);
  background: #fff;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
}
.fi-light .fi-block.active {
  background: #fff;
  border-color: #e8357a;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 32px rgba(232,53,122,0.15);
}
.fi-light .fi-block.active::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 3px;
  background: var(--brand-grad-h); border-radius: 10px 10px 0 0;
}
.fi-block-label {
  font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.62rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase;
  color: rgba(13,27,46,0.4); margin-bottom: 12px;
}
.fi-light .fi-block.active .fi-block-label { color: #e8357a; }

/* profile */
.fi-profile-row { display: flex; gap: 14px; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 14px; }
.fi-avatar {
  width: 46px; height: 46px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0;
  background: var(--brand-grad); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1rem; color: white; font-weight: 700;
}
.fi-player-name { font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.05rem; margin-bottom: 3px; color: #0d1b2e; }
.fi-player-meta { font-size: 0.68rem; color: rgba(13,27,46,0.5); font-family: var(--font-mono); }
.fi-stats-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4,1fr); gap: 8px; margin-top: 4px; }
.fi-stat {
  background: rgba(13,27,46,0.05); border-radius: 6px; padding: 8px; text-align: center;
}
.fi-stat-n {
  display: block; font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.3rem; font-weight: 700;
  background: var(--brand-grad); -webkit-background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text;
}
.fi-stat-l { display: block; font-size: 0.58rem; color: rgba(13,27,46,0.4); font-family: var(--font-mono); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; margin-top: 2px; }

/* index */
.fi-index-title { font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 600; color: #0d1b2e; margin-bottom: 14px; }
.fi-index-rows { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 9px; }
.fi-index-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto 110px; align-items: center; gap: 10px; }
.fi-idx-label { font-size: 0.7rem; color: rgba(13,27,46,0.6); }
.fi-idx-val { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.75rem; color: #0d1b2e; font-weight: 600; }
.fi-idx-bar { height: 3px; background: rgba(13,27,46,0.08); border-radius: 2px; }
.fi-idx-fill { height: 100%; border-radius: 2px; background: var(--brand-grad-h); }

/* best/worst stats */
.fi-best-stat, .fi-worst-stat { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 4px; }
.fi-bs-bar { display: block; height: 3px; background: var(--brand-grad-h); border-radius: 2px; flex-shrink: 0; }
.fi-ws-bar { display: block; height: 3px; background: linear-gradient(90deg,#c0392b,#e74c3c); border-radius: 2px; flex-shrink: 0; }
.fi-bs-label { font-size: 0.66rem; color: rgba(13,27,46,0.6); font-family: var(--font-mono); }
.fi-bs-label em { color: var(--brand-orange); font-style: normal; }

/* projection */
.fi-proj-line { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
.fi-proj-champ { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.72rem; color: rgba(13,27,46,0.5); }
.fi-proj-arrow { color: #e8357a; font-size: 1rem; }
.fi-proj-target {
  font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700;
  background: var(--brand-grad); -webkit-background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text;
}

/* similarities */
.fi-similar-row { display: flex; gap: 20px; }
.fi-similar-player { text-align: center; }
.fi-sim-av { width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%; margin: 0 auto 6px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 0.68rem; color: white; font-weight: 700; }
.fi-sim-name { font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 600; color: #0d1b2e; margin-bottom: 2px; }
.fi-sim-club { font-size: 0.6rem; color: rgba(13,27,46,0.45); font-family: var(--font-mono); }

/* explain panel (stays dark) */
.fi-explain-panel {
  background: #141414; border: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.08);
  border-radius: 12px; padding: 32px; position: sticky; top: 100px;
  min-height: 420px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center;
}
.fi-explain-default { text-align: center; padding: 20px 0; }
.fi-explain-tag {
  font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.62rem; letter-spacing: 0.14em;
  text-transform: uppercase; display: inline-block;
  padding: 3px 12px; border-radius: 20px;
  background: rgba(232,53,122,0.08); border: 1px solid rgba(232,53,122,0.3);
  color: var(--brand-pink); margin-bottom: 16px;
}
.fi-explain-title {
  font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.55rem; font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1.2; margin-bottom: 16px;
  background: var(--brand-grad); -webkit-background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text;
}
.fi-explain-body { font-size: 0.86rem; color: #b8c6d8; line-height: 1.8; margin-bottom: 20px; }
.fi-explain-insight {
  background: rgba(232,53,122,0.08); border: 1px solid rgba(232,53,122,0.2);
  border-radius: 8px; padding: 14px 16px;
  font-size: 0.8rem; color: #f0f4f8; line-height: 1.7;
}
.fi-explain-insight::before { content: "💡 "; }

@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .fi-demo-layout { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .fi-explain-panel { position: static; min-height: auto; }
  .fi-index-row { grid-template-columns: 1fr auto 70px; }
}


/* ── VRAIE FICHE ── */
.vf-layout {
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 300px; gap: 28px; align-items: start;
}
.vf-image-wrap {
  position: relative; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 48px rgba(13,27,46,0.15);
  border: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.08);
}
.vf-img { width: 100%; display: block; }

/* Hotspots */
.vf-hotspot {
  position: absolute; cursor: pointer;
  border: 2px solid transparent;
  border-radius: 6px;
  transition: all 0.2s;
  display: flex; align-items: flex-end; justify-content: flex-start;
  padding: 6px 8px;
}
.vf-hotspot:hover {
  background: rgba(232,53,122,0.08);
  border-color: rgba(232,53,122,0.5);
}
.vf-hotspot.active {
  background: rgba(232,53,122,0.1);
  border-color: #e8357a;
  box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(232,53,122,0.3);
}
.vf-hs-label {
  font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.6rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase;
  background: rgba(232,53,122,0.85); color: white;
  padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 4px;
  opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.2s;
  pointer-events: none;
}
.vf-hotspot:hover .vf-hs-label,
.vf-hotspot.active .vf-hs-label { opacity: 1; }

/* Explain panel */
.vf-explain {
  background: #0d1b2e;
  border-radius: 12px; padding: 28px;
  position: sticky; top: 100px;
  min-height: 380px;
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
}
.vf-tag {
  font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.62rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase;
  display: inline-block; padding: 3px 12px; border-radius: 20px;
  background: rgba(232,53,122,0.12); border: 1px solid rgba(232,53,122,0.3);
  color: #e8357a; margin-bottom: 14px;
}
.vf-title {
  font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.45rem; font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1.2; margin-bottom: 14px;
  background: var(--brand-grad); -webkit-background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text;
}
.vf-body { font-size: 0.84rem; color: #b8c6d8; line-height: 1.8; margin-bottom: 18px; }
.vf-insight {
  background: rgba(232,53,122,0.07); border: 1px solid rgba(232,53,122,0.2);
  border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 14px;
  font-size: 0.78rem; color: #f0f4f8; line-height: 1.7;
}
.vf-insight::before { content: "💡 "; }

@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .vf-layout { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .vf-explain { position: static; min-height: auto; }
}


/* ── PROJECTION & COMPARAISON ── */
.proj-image-wrap {
  border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 48px rgba(13,27,46,0.12);
  border: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.08);
}
.proj-img { width: 100%; display: block; }

.proj-compare-title {
  font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: clamp(1.6rem,3vw,2.6rem);
  font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.1;
  background: var(--brand-grad); -webkit-background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text;
}

.proj-compare-grid {
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto 1fr; gap: 24px; align-items: start;
}

.proj-player-card {
  background: #fff; border: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.08);
  border-radius: 14px; padding: 28px;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(13,27,46,0.06);
  transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
}
.proj-player-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-3px);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 40px rgba(13,27,46,0.1);
}

.ppc-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; margin-bottom: 20px; }
.ppc-avatar {
  width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 0.95rem; color: white; font-weight: 700;
}
.ppc-name { font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.05rem; color: #0d1b2e; }
.ppc-club { font-size: 0.7rem; color: #7a8a99; font-family: var(--font-mono); margin-top: 2px; }
.ppc-index {
  margin-left: auto; font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 700;
  background: var(--brand-grad); -webkit-background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text;
}

.ppc-stats { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 16px; }
.ppc-stat-row {
  display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
  font-size: 0.78rem; color: #5a6a7a; padding: 6px 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.05);
}
.ppc-val { font-weight: 600; color: #0d1b2e; font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.78rem; }

.ppc-verdict {
  font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  text-transform: uppercase; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 20px;
  background: rgba(232,53,122,0.08); border: 1px solid rgba(232,53,122,0.2);
  color: var(--brand-pink); display: inline-block;
}

.proj-vs {
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;
  justify-content: center; gap: 16px; padding: 20px 10px;
}
.proj-vs-circle {
  width: 52px; height: 52px; border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--brand-grad); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.1rem; color: white; font-weight: 700;
}
.proj-vs-context {
  font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.68rem; letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-align: center; color: #7a8a99; line-height: 1.6;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}
.proj-vs-context strong { color: #0d1b2e; display: block; margin-top: 2px; }
.proj-vs-insight {
  font-size: 0.72rem; color: #7a8a99; text-align: center; line-height: 1.6; max-width: 120px;
}

.proj-key-insight {
  display: flex; gap: 20px; align-items: flex-start;
  background: #0d1b2e; border-radius: 12px; padding: 28px 32px;
  margin-top: 32px;
}
.pki-icon { font-size: 1.5rem; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 2px; }
.pki-title {
  font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 700;
  color: #f0f4f8; margin-bottom: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.03em;
}
.pki-body { font-size: 0.85rem; color: #b8c6d8; line-height: 1.8; }

@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .proj-compare-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .proj-vs { flex-direction: row; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center; }
}


/* ── PROJECTION LEGEND ── */
.proj-legend {
  display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 28px;
}
.proj-legend-item {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
  font-size: 0.78rem; color: #5a6a7a;
}
.plt-dot {
  width: 12px; height: 12px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0;
}


/* ── PLATFORM BLOCKS ── */
.platform-block {
  background: #ffffff;
  border: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.08);
  border-radius: 16px; padding: 40px;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(13,27,46,0.05);
}
.pb-header {
  display: flex; gap: 18px; align-items: flex-start; margin-bottom: 36px;
  padding-bottom: 28px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.07);
}
.pb-icon {
  width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 12px; flex-shrink: 0;
  background: rgba(232,53,122,0.08); border: 1px solid rgba(232,53,122,0.15);
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 1.3rem;
}
.pb-tag {
  font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 0.14em;
  text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--brand-pink); margin-bottom: 5px;
}
.pb-title {
  font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700;
  color: #0d1b2e; letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}

.pb-tools-grid {
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 16px;
}
.pb-tool {
  background: #f5f2ee; border: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.07);
  border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px;
  transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
}
.pb-tool:hover {
  border-color: rgba(232,53,122,0.3);
  box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(13,27,46,0.06);
}
.pb-tool-highlight {
  background: #f5f2ee;
  border-color: rgba(13,27,46,0.08);
}
.pb-tool-icon { font-size: 1.3rem; margin-bottom: 10px; }
.pb-tool-title {
  font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.95rem; color: #0d1b2e;
  margin-bottom: 8px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.pb-tool-desc { font-size: 0.82rem; color: #5a6a7a; line-height: 1.7; margin-bottom: 10px; }
.pb-tool-example {
  font-size: 0.75rem; color: #7a8a99; font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-style: italic; padding: 8px 12px;
  background: rgba(13,27,46,0.04); border-radius: 6px;
  border-left: 2px solid rgba(232,53,122,0.4);
}
.pb-new-badge {
  font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.55rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  text-transform: uppercase; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 10px;
  background: var(--brand-grad); color: white; font-style: normal; font-weight: 400;
}

/* classic criteria pills */
.pb-classic {
  background: rgba(13,27,46,0.03); border-radius: 10px; padding: 16px 20px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.06);
}
.pb-classic-label {
  font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.62rem; letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  text-transform: uppercase; color: #7a8a99; margin-bottom: 10px;
}
.pb-classic-pills { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; }
.pb-pill {
  font-size: 0.75rem; color: #5a6a7a; background: #ffffff;
  border: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.1); border-radius: 20px;
  padding: 4px 12px; font-family: var(--font-mono);
}

@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .pb-tools-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .platform-block { padding: 24px; }
}


/* ── BEFORE / AFTER ── */
.proj-before-after { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto 1fr; gap: 24px; align-items: start; }
.pba-col { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; }
.pba-label { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; padding: 14px 18px; border-radius: 10px; }
.pba-label-before { background: rgba(13,27,46,0.05); border: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.08); }
.pba-label-after { background: rgba(232,53,122,0.06); border: 1px solid rgba(232,53,122,0.2); }
.pba-step {
  font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.8rem; font-weight: 700;
  background: var(--brand-grad); -webkit-background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; flex-shrink: 0; line-height: 1;
}
.pba-title { font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.95rem; color: #0d1b2e; }
.pba-sub { font-size: 0.7rem; color: #7a8a99; font-family: var(--font-mono); margin-top: 2px; }
.pba-img-wrap {
  position: relative; border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden;
  box-shadow: 0 6px 32px rgba(13,27,46,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.08);
}
.pba-img { width: 100%; display: block; }
.pba-img-tag {
  position: absolute; top: 10px; right: 10px;
  font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.6rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  text-transform: uppercase; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 20px; font-weight: 600;
}
.pba-tag-before { background: rgba(13,27,46,0.75); color: white; }
.pba-tag-after { background: rgba(232,53,122,0.9); color: white; }
.pba-points { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; }
.pba-point { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-size: 0.8rem; color: #5a6a7a; line-height: 1.5; }
.pba-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; }
.pba-arrow { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 12px; padding: 20px 8px; margin-top: 60px; }
.pba-arrow-circle {
  width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--brand-grad); display: flex; align-items: center;
  justify-content: center; font-size: 1.3rem; color: white; font-weight: 700;
}
.pba-arrow-label { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.62rem; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-align: center; color: #7a8a99; text-transform: uppercase; line-height: 1.6; }
@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .proj-before-after { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .pba-arrow { flex-direction: row; margin-top: 0; }
}


/* ── HOW AUDIENCE ── */
.how-audience {
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto 1fr; gap: 0;
  background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.08);
  border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; margin-top: 32px;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(13,27,46,0.05);
}
.how-aud-item {
  display: flex; gap: 20px; align-items: flex-start; padding: 32px 36px;
}
.how-aud-icon {
  font-size: 1.8rem; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 2px;
}
.how-aud-title {
  font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.3rem; font-weight: 700;
  color: #0d1b2e; letter-spacing: 0.03em; margin-bottom: 8px;
}
.how-aud-desc { font-size: 0.85rem; color: #5a6a7a; line-height: 1.75; }
.how-aud-divider {
  width: 1px; background: rgba(13,27,46,0.07);
  margin: 24px 0;
}
@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .how-audience { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .how-aud-divider { width: auto; height: 1px; margin: 0 24px; }
}


/* ── HOW AUDIENCE ── */
.how-audience {
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto 1fr;
  background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.08);
  border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; margin-top: 32px;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(13,27,46,0.05);
}
.how-aud-item { display: flex; gap: 20px; align-items: flex-start; padding: 32px 36px; }
.how-aud-icon { font-size: 1.8rem; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 2px; }
.how-aud-title {
  font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.3rem; font-weight: 700;
  color: #0d1b2e; letter-spacing: 0.03em; margin-bottom: 8px;
}
.how-aud-desc { font-size: 0.85rem; color: #5a6a7a; line-height: 1.75; }
.how-aud-divider { width: 1px; background: rgba(13,27,46,0.07); margin: 24px 0; }
@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .how-audience { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .how-aud-divider { width: auto; height: 1px; margin: 0 24px; }
}


/* ── AGENCY TUNNEL ── */
.tunnel-wrap { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0; }
.tunnel-step {
  display: flex; gap: 0;
  background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.08);
  border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 16px rgba(13,27,46,0.04);
}
.tunnel-step-num {
  font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 3rem; font-weight: 700;
  background: var(--brand-grad); -webkit-background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text;
  padding: 28px 24px; min-width: 80px; text-align: center;
  border-right: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.06);
  display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: center;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.tunnel-step-body { flex: 1; padding: 24px 28px; }
.tunnel-step-header {
  display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start;
  gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 16px;
}
.tunnel-step-title {
  font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.3rem; font-weight: 700;
  color: #0d1b2e; letter-spacing: 0.03em; margin-bottom: 4px;
}
.tunnel-step-sub { font-size: 0.8rem; color: #5a6a7a; line-height: 1.6; max-width: 480px; }
.tunnel-step-price {
  font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.6rem; font-weight: 700;
  background: var(--brand-grad); -webkit-background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text;
  white-space: nowrap; flex-shrink: 0; text-align: right;
}
.tunnel-ht {
  font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 400;
  color: #7a8a99; -webkit-text-fill-color: #7a8a99;
}
.tunnel-step-details { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 12px; }
.tunnel-detail { font-size: 0.8rem; color: #5a6a7a; line-height: 1.6; }
.tunnel-step-note {
  font-size: 0.72rem; color: #7a8a99; font-family: var(--font-mono);
  font-style: italic; padding: 8px 12px; background: rgba(13,27,46,0.03);
  border-radius: 6px; border-left: 2px solid rgba(232,53,122,0.3);
}
.tunnel-connector {
  display: flex; justify-content: flex-start; padding: 8px 0 8px 40px;
}
.tunnel-plus {
  font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.5rem;
  background: var(--brand-grad); -webkit-background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text;
}
.tunnel-total {
  background: #0d1b2e; border-radius: 12px; padding: 28px 32px;
  margin-top: 8px;
}
.tunnel-total-label {
  font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); margin-bottom: 16px;
}
.tunnel-total-examples { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; }
.tunnel-example {
  display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
  padding: 10px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
}
.tunnel-example-desc { font-size: 0.85rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); }
.tunnel-example-price {
  font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 700;
  background: var(--brand-grad); -webkit-background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text;
}
@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .tunnel-step { flex-direction: column; }
  .tunnel-step-num { border-right: none; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.06); padding: 16px; min-width: auto; text-align: left; }
  .tunnel-step-header { flex-direction: column; }
  .tunnel-connector { padding-left: 20px; }
}


/* ── PLATFORM PRICING ── */
.plat-pricing { }
.plat-price-block {
  background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.08);
  border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden;
}
.plat-price-block-title {
  font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 700;
  color: #0d1b2e; letter-spacing: 0.03em;
  padding: 18px 24px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.06);
  background: rgba(13,27,46,0.02);
}
.plat-price-grid { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
.plat-price-row {
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr;
  padding: 12px 24px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.04);
  font-size: 0.82rem; color: #5a6a7a; align-items: center;
  transition: background 0.15s;
}
.plat-price-row:hover { background: rgba(13,27,46,0.02); }
.plat-price-row.header {
  font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  text-transform: uppercase; color: #7a8a99; background: rgba(13,27,46,0.03);
}
.plat-val {
  font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 700;
  background: var(--brand-grad); -webkit-background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text;
}
.plat-annual { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.78rem; color: #7a8a99; }
.plat-price-note {
  padding: 12px 24px; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #7a8a99;
  font-style: italic; background: rgba(13,27,46,0.02);
}
.plat-elite-row {
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3,1fr); gap: 16px;
}
.plat-elite-card {
  background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.08);
  border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px;
}
.plat-elite-advanced { border-color: rgba(232,53,122,0.25); }
.plat-elite-premium { border-color: rgba(139,63,200,0.2); }
.plat-elite-title {
  font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 700;
  color: #0d1b2e; margin-bottom: 8px; letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}
.plat-elite-desc { font-size: 0.8rem; color: #5a6a7a; line-height: 1.65; margin-bottom: 16px; }
.plat-elite-price {
  font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.8rem; font-weight: 700;
  background: var(--brand-grad); -webkit-background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; line-height: 1;
}
.plat-elite-period {
  font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 400;
  color: #7a8a99; -webkit-text-fill-color: #7a8a99;
}
.plat-elite-annual { font-size: 0.72rem; color: #7a8a99; font-family: var(--font-mono); margin-top: 4px; }
@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .plat-price-row { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
  .plat-price-row > span:last-child { display: none; }
  .plat-elite-row { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
}


/* ── PLAT CARDS ── */
.plat-cards-grid {
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3,1fr); gap: 20px;
}
.plat-card {
  background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.08);
  border-radius: 14px; padding: 28px;
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 16px rgba(13,27,46,0.04);
  transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
}
.plat-card:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(13,27,46,0.08); }
.plat-card-featured {
  border-color: rgba(232,53,122,0.3);
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fff 0%, #fdf5f8 100%);
}
.plat-card-icon { font-size: 1.5rem; }
.plat-card-name {
  font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 700;
  color: #0d1b2e; letter-spacing: 0.03em;
}
.plat-card-type {
  font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--brand-pink);
}
.plat-card-desc { font-size: 0.82rem; color: #5a6a7a; line-height: 1.7; flex: 1; }
.plat-card-prices { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; }
.plat-card-price-row {
  display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
  font-size: 0.8rem; color: #5a6a7a; padding: 5px 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.04);
}
.plat-card-price-row strong {
  font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1rem;
  background: var(--brand-grad); -webkit-background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text;
}
.plat-card-price-main {
  font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 2.8rem; font-weight: 700;
  background: var(--brand-grad); -webkit-background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; line-height: 1;
}
.plat-card-note {
  font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.68rem; color: #7a8a99;
}
.plat-card-addon {
  background: rgba(232,53,122,0.06); border: 1px solid rgba(232,53,122,0.15);
  border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 14px; margin-top: 4px;
}
.plat-addon-title {
  font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.85rem; color: #0d1b2e; margin-bottom: 4px;
}
.plat-addon-title span { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.7rem; color: var(--brand-pink); font-weight: 400; margin-left: 6px; }
.plat-addon-desc { font-size: 0.75rem; color: #5a6a7a; line-height: 1.6; }
@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .plat-cards-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
}


/* ── PLAT CARDS ── */
.plat-cards-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3,1fr); gap: 20px; }
.plat-card {
  background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.08);
  border-radius: 14px; padding: 28px;
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 16px rgba(13,27,46,0.04);
  transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
}
.plat-card:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(13,27,46,0.08); }
.plat-card-featured { border-color: rgba(232,53,122,0.3); }
.plat-card-icon { font-size: 1.5rem; }
.plat-card-name {
  font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 700;
  color: #0d1b2e; letter-spacing: 0.03em;
}
.plat-card-type {
  font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--brand-pink);
}
.plat-card-desc { font-size: 0.82rem; color: #5a6a7a; line-height: 1.7; flex: 1; }
.plat-card-from {
  font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  text-transform: uppercase; color: #7a8a99; margin-top: 8px;
}
.plat-card-price-main {
  font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 2.4rem; font-weight: 700;
  background: var(--brand-grad); -webkit-background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; line-height: 1;
}
.plat-card-note {
  font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.65rem;
  color: #7a8a99; -webkit-text-fill-color: #7a8a99;
}
.plat-card-cta {
  display: inline-block; margin-top: 4px;
  font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.72rem; letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  color: var(--brand-pink); text-decoration: none;
  transition: opacity 0.2s;
}
.plat-card-cta:hover { opacity: 0.7; }
@media (max-width: 900px) { .plat-cards-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }


/* ── CONTACT FORM ── */
.contact-form-wrap {
  max-width: 640px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}
.contact-form {
  background: #ffffff;
  border: 1px solid rgba(13,27,46,0.08);
  border-radius: 14px;
  padding: 48px;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 32px rgba(13,27,46,0.06);
}

/* ── MOBILE ── */
@media (max-width: 900px) {
  #hero { grid-template-columns: 1fr; padding-top: 100px; }
  .hero-visual { display: none; }
  .hero-stats { gap: 24px; }
  .problems-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .how-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
  .platform-layout { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .pricing-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .contact-layout { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .form-row { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .nav-links { display: none; }
  footer { flex-direction: column; gap: 20px; text-align: center; }
}
</style>
</head>
<body class="lang-fr">

<!-- Language toggle -->
<div class="lang-toggle">
  <button class="active" onclick="setLang('fr')">FR</button>
  <button onclick="setLang('en')">EN</button>
</div>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav>
  <a href="#hero" class="nav-logo">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Football Insights" style="height:56px;width:56px;object-fit:contain;">
  </a>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#problems"><span class="txt-fr">Enjeux</span><span class="txt-en">Challenges</span></a></li>
    <li><a href="#how"><span class="txt-fr">Méthode</span><span class="txt-en">Method</span></a></li>
    <li><a href="#demo-fiche"><span class="txt-fr">La fiche</span><span class="txt-en">The report</span></a></li>
    <li><a href="#projection"><span class="txt-fr">Projection</span><span class="txt-en">Projection</span></a></li>
    <li><a href="#platform"><span class="txt-fr">Plateforme</span><span class="txt-en">Platform</span></a></li>
    <li><a href="#pricing"><span class="txt-fr">Tarifs</span><span class="txt-en">Pricing</span></a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
  </ul>
  <a href="#contact" class="nav-cta"><span class="txt-fr">Nous contacter</span><span class="txt-en">Get in touch</span></a>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section id="hero">
  <div class="hero-bg"></div>
  <div class="hero-grid"></div>
  <div class="hero-content">
    <div class="hero-tag">Scout · Project · Decide</div>
    <h1 class="hero-title">
      <span class="txt-fr">Anticiper<br>les <span class="accent">trajectoires.</span><br>Décider.</span>
      <span class="txt-en">Anticipate<br><span class="accent">trajectories.</span><br>Decide.</span>
    </h1>
    <p class="hero-sub">
      <span class="txt-fr">Football Insights transforme <em>l'intuition en décision structurée</em> grâce à une méthode de projection inter-championnats unique.</span>
      <span class="txt-en">Football Insights turns <em>intuition into structured decision-making</em> through a unique cross-league projection methodology.</span>
    </p>
    <div class="hero-actions">
      <a href="#contact" class="btn-primary"><span class="txt-fr">Demander une démo</span><span class="txt-en">Request a demo</span></a>
      <a href="#how" class="btn-ghost"><span class="txt-fr">Voir la méthode</span><span class="txt-en">See the method</span></a>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-stats">
      <div class="hero-stat-item fade-up">
        <div class="hero-stat-num">80+</div>
        <div class="hero-stat-label"><span class="txt-fr">Championnats</span><span class="txt-en">Leagues</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-stat-item fade-up">
        <div class="hero-stat-num">50+</div>
        <div class="hero-stat-label"><span class="txt-fr">Pays couverts</span><span class="txt-en">Countries</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-stat-item fade-up">
        <div class="hero-stat-num">100+</div>
        <div class="hero-stat-label"><span class="txt-fr">Ligues depuis 2018</span><span class="txt-en">Leagues since 2018</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-visual">
    <div class="hero-card">
      <div class="hc-label">Football Insights · Player Report</div>
      <div class="hc-player">Thomas Jørgensen</div>
      <div class="hc-team">Viborg FK · RCMF · Age 20</div>
      <div class="hc-level-label">Estimated level</div>
      <div class="hc-level-title">Great starter in the Championship</div>
      <div class="stat-row">
        <div class="stat-row-header"><span class="stat-name">Level without finishing</span><span class="stat-val">53.6</span></div>
        <div class="stat-bar"><div class="stat-fill" style="width:67%"></div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-row">
        <div class="stat-row-header"><span class="stat-name">Level incl. finishing</span><span class="stat-val">54.0</span></div>
        <div class="stat-bar"><div class="stat-fill" style="width:68%"></div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-row">
        <div class="stat-row-header"><span class="stat-name">Trend level</span><span class="stat-val">46.6</span></div>
        <div class="stat-bar"><div class="stat-fill" style="width:58%"></div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="hc-divider"></div>
      <div class="hc-projection">
        <div class="hc-proj-icon">🎯</div>
        <div class="hc-proj-text"><strong>Projected → FC Dallas</strong><br>MLS Top 10% at position</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PROBLEMS -->
<section id="problems">
  <div class="section-tag fade-up"><span class="txt-fr">Le constat</span><span class="txt-en">The challenge</span></div>
  <h2 class="section-title fade-up">
    <span class="txt-fr">Trois enjeux<br>du football moderne</span>
    <span class="txt-en">Three major<br>challenges in recruitment</span>
  </h2>
  <p class="section-lead fade-up">
    <span class="txt-fr">Les données existent. Mais comprendre un joueur — vraiment — demande bien plus qu'une seule saison.</span>
    <span class="txt-en">Data exists everywhere. But truly understanding a player requires much more than a single season.</span>
  </p>
  <div class="problems-grid">
    <div class="problem-card fade-up" data-lang="fr">
      <div class="problem-num">01</div>
      <div class="problem-title">Lire <span>une seule saison ne suffit pas</span></div>
      <div class="problem-text">Comprendre un joueur demande d'intégrer trajectoire, contexte et évolution de niveau dans la durée.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="problem-card fade-up" data-lang="fr">
      <div class="problem-num">02</div>
      <div class="problem-title">Comparer <span>deux ligues reste complexe</span></div>
      <div class="problem-text">Même poste, mêmes chiffres… mais les exigences varient considérablement selon le championnat.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="problem-card fade-up" data-lang="fr">
      <div class="problem-num">03</div>
      <div class="problem-title">Les décisions manquent <span>d'outils de projection</span></div>
      <div class="problem-text">Nos projections s'appuient sur des trajectoires comparables pour anticiper des parcours de carrière réalistes.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="problem-card fade-up" data-lang="fr" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(232,53,122,0.08),rgba(139,63,200,0.04));border-color:rgba(232,53,122,0.3);">
      <div class="problem-num" style="background:var(--brand-grad);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;">→</div>
      <div class="problem-title" style="background:var(--brand-grad);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;">Football Insights transforme l'intuition en décision structurée</div>
      <div class="problem-text">Une méthode. Des données contextualisées. Des projections actionnables.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="problem-card fade-up" data-lang="en">
      <div class="problem-num">01</div>
      <div class="problem-title">Reading <span>a single season is not enough</span></div>
      <div class="problem-text">Understanding a player requires integrating trajectory, context and performance evolution over time.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="problem-card fade-up" data-lang="en">
      <div class="problem-num">02</div>
      <div class="problem-title">Comparing <span>two leagues remains complex</span></div>
      <div class="problem-text">Same position, similar numbers… but different demands depending on the competition.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="problem-card fade-up" data-lang="en">
      <div class="problem-num">03</div>
      <div class="problem-title">Recruitment decisions <span>lack projection tools</span></div>
      <div class="problem-text">Our projections rely on comparable career paths to anticipate realistic performance outcomes.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="problem-card fade-up" data-lang="en" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(232,53,122,0.08),rgba(139,63,200,0.04));border-color:rgba(232,53,122,0.3);">
      <div class="problem-num" style="background:var(--brand-grad);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;">→</div>
      <div class="problem-title" style="background:var(--brand-grad);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;">Football Insights turns intuition into structured decision-making</div>
      <div class="problem-text">One methodology. Contextualised data. Actionable projections.</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- HOW IT WORKS -->
<section id="how">
  <div class="section-tag fade-up"><span class="txt-fr">La méthode</span><span class="txt-en">The method</span></div>
  <h2 class="section-title fade-up">
    <span class="txt-fr">Comment ça fonctionne</span>
    <span class="txt-en">How it works</span>
  </h2>
  <div class="how-grid">
    <div class="how-item fade-up" data-lang="fr">
      <div class="how-number">01</div>
      <div class="how-icon">🔎</div>
      <div class="how-title">Identification</div>
      <div class="how-text">Identifier les contextes clubs les plus crédibles pour la trajectoire du joueur.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="how-item fade-up" data-lang="fr">
      <div class="how-number">02</div>
      <div class="how-icon">🌍</div>
      <div class="how-title">Projection</div>
      <div class="how-text">Estimer le niveau potentiel dans un nouveau contexte avant les discussions.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="how-item fade-up" data-lang="fr">
      <div class="how-number">03</div>
      <div class="how-icon">🎯</div>
      <div class="how-title">Priorisation</div>
      <div class="how-text">Hiérarchiser les opportunités de carrière avec un cadre objectif partagé.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="how-item fade-up" data-lang="fr">
      <div class="how-number">04</div>
      <div class="how-icon">🗂</div>
      <div class="how-title">Suivi</div>
      <div class="how-text">Suivre l'évolution du joueur dans le temps pour ajuster la stratégie de carrière.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="how-item fade-up" data-lang="en">
      <div class="how-number">01</div>
      <div class="how-icon">🔎</div>
      <div class="how-title">Detection</div>
      <div class="how-text">Identify compatible profiles quickly based on your level and playing model.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="how-item fade-up" data-lang="en">
      <div class="how-number">02</div>
      <div class="how-icon">🌍</div>
      <div class="how-title">Projection</div>
      <div class="how-text">Estimate potential performance level in your league before in-depth video scouting.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="how-item fade-up" data-lang="en">
      <div class="how-number">03</div>
      <div class="how-icon">🎯</div>
      <div class="how-title">Prioritisation</div>
      <div class="how-text">Rank transfer targets using a shared objective framework.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="how-item fade-up" data-lang="en">
      <div class="how-number">04</div>
      <div class="how-icon">🗂</div>
      <div class="how-title">Workflow</div>
      <div class="how-text">Structure the internal process between data, scouting and sporting decision-making.</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Double audience -->
  <div class="how-audience fade-up">
    <div class="how-aud-item">
      <div class="how-aud-icon">🏟️</div>
      <div>
        <div class="how-aud-title"><span class="txt-fr">Pour les clubs</span><span class="txt-en">For clubs</span></div>
        <div class="how-aud-desc">
          <span class="txt-fr">Détection, projection et priorisation des cibles mercato. Structuration du processus entre data, scouting et décision sportive.</span>
          <span class="txt-en">Detection, projection and prioritisation of transfer targets. Structuring the process between data, scouting and sporting decision-making.</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="how-aud-divider"></div>
    <div class="how-aud-item">
      <div class="how-aud-icon">🤝</div>
      <div>
        <div class="how-aud-title"><span class="txt-fr">Pour les agences</span><span class="txt-en">For agencies</span></div>
        <div class="how-aud-desc">
          <span class="txt-fr">Anticipation des trajectoires de carrière, valorisation objective des joueurs et préparation des dossiers clubs avant les discussions.</span>
          <span class="txt-en">Anticipating career trajectories, objective player valuation and preparing club dossiers before discussions begin.</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</section>

<!-- PLATFORM -->
<!-- FICHE INTERACTIVE -->
<section id="demo-fiche" style="padding:100px 6%;background:#f5f2ee;">
  <div class="section-tag fade-up"><span class="txt-fr">La fiche en action</span><span class="txt-en">The report in action</span></div>
  <h2 class="section-title fade-up">
    <span class="txt-fr">Cliquez sur chaque partie<br>pour comprendre ce qu'elle révèle</span>
    <span class="txt-en">Click each section<br>to understand what it reveals</span>
  </h2>
  <p class="section-lead fade-up" style="margin-bottom:48px">
    <span class="txt-fr">Michael Olise (Bayern München) — cliquez sur chaque zone pour comprendre ce qu'elle révèle.</span>
    <span class="txt-en">Arthur Atta (Udinese) projected to the Premier League — click each zone to understand what it reveals.</span>
  </p>

  <div class="fi-demo-layout fade-up">

    <!-- Image avec hotspots FR (Olise) -->
    <div class="fi-report fi-image-wrap" id="fi-img-fr">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Fiche Football Insights — Michael Olise" class="fi-real-img">

      <div class="vf-hotspot" style="left:1%;top:4%;width:32%;height:44%"
           onclick="fiSelect('profile')" title="Profil joueur">
        <span class="vf-hs-label"><span class="txt-fr">Profil</span><span class="txt-en">Profile</span></span>
      </div>

      <div class="vf-hotspot" style="left:1%;top:48%;width:32%;height:47%"
           onclick="fiSelect('stats')" title="Statistiques clés">
        <span class="vf-hs-label"><span class="txt-fr">Stats clés</span><span class="txt-en">Key stats</span></span>
      </div>

      <div class="vf-hotspot" style="left:33%;top:4%;width:33%;height:58%"
           onclick="fiSelect('index')" title="Index & Trajectoire">
        <span class="vf-hs-label"><span class="txt-fr">Index & Trajectoire</span><span class="txt-en">Index & Trajectory</span></span>
      </div>

      <div class="vf-hotspot" style="left:33%;top:62%;width:33%;height:33%"
           onclick="fiSelect('similar')" title="Similarités">
        <span class="vf-hs-label"><span class="txt-fr">Similarités</span><span class="txt-en">Similar players</span></span>
      </div>

      <div class="vf-hotspot" style="left:66%;top:4%;width:34%;height:47%"
           onclick="fiSelect('radar')" title="Radar">
        <span class="vf-hs-label"><span class="txt-fr">Radar</span><span class="txt-en">Radar</span></span>
      </div>

      <div class="vf-hotspot" style="left:66%;top:51%;width:34%;height:44%"
           onclick="fiSelect('scatter')" title="Scatter plot">
        <span class="vf-hs-label"><span class="txt-fr">Positionnement marché</span><span class="txt-en">Market positioning</span></span>
      </div>

    </div>

    <!-- Panneau d'explication -->
    <div class="fi-explain-panel" id="fi-explain">
      <div class="fi-explain-default" id="fi-default">
        <div style="font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:16px;text-align:center">👆</div>
        <div style="font-family:'Oswald',sans-serif;font-size:1.3rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:12px;color:#f0f4f8;text-align:center">
          <span class="txt-fr">Cliquez sur une zone</span>
          <span class="txt-en">Click a block</span>
        </div>
        <div style="font-size:0.85rem;color:#b8c6d8;line-height:1.75;text-align:center">
          <span class="txt-fr">Chaque partie de la fiche révèle une information précise sur le joueur.</span>
          <span class="txt-en">Each section of the report reveals specific information. Explore them to understand what Football Insights actually gives you.</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="fi-explain-content" id="fi-content" style="display:none">
        <div class="fi-explain-tag" id="fi-tag"></div>
        <div class="fi-explain-title" id="fi-title"></div>
        <div class="fi-explain-body" id="fi-body"></div>
        <div class="fi-explain-insight" id="fi-insight"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

  <!-- ── TARIFS PLATEFORME ── -->
  <div class="plat-pricing fade-up" style="margin-top:48px;">
    <div class="section-tag" style="margin-bottom:20px">
      <span class="txt-fr">Tarifs plateforme</span>
      <span class="txt-en">Platform pricing</span>
    </div>

    <div class="plat-cards-grid">

      <div class="plat-card">
        <div class="plat-card-icon">🎯</div>
        <div class="plat-card-name">Access</div>
        <div class="plat-card-type"><span class="txt-fr">Par championnat</span><span class="txt-en">By league</span></div>
        <div class="plat-card-desc">
          <span class="txt-fr">Accès aux fiches, radars, projections et historiques pour le ou les championnats sélectionnés.</span>
          <span class="txt-en">Access to reports, radars, projections and historical data for selected leagues.</span>
        </div>
        <div class="plat-card-from"><span class="txt-fr">À partir de</span><span class="txt-en">Starting from</span></div>
        <div class="plat-card-price-main">40€ <span class="plat-card-note">HT/mois</span></div>
        <a href="#contact" class="plat-card-cta"><span class="txt-fr">Nous contacter →</span><span class="txt-en">Get in touch →</span></a>
      </div>

      <div class="plat-card">
        <div class="plat-card-icon">🌍</div>
        <div class="plat-card-name">Regional Access</div>
        <div class="plat-card-type"><span class="txt-fr">Multi-pays</span><span class="txt-en">Multi-country</span></div>
        <div class="plat-card-desc">
          <span class="txt-fr">Accès illimité aux fiches et projections sur un périmètre géographique. Pays révisables à chaque renouvellement.</span>
          <span class="txt-en">Unlimited access to reports and projections for a geographic scope. Countries revisable at each renewal.</span>
        </div>
        <div class="plat-card-from"><span class="txt-fr">À partir de</span><span class="txt-en">Starting from</span></div>
        <div class="plat-card-price-main">250€ <span class="plat-card-note">HT/mois</span></div>
        <a href="#contact" class="plat-card-cta"><span class="txt-fr">Nous contacter →</span><span class="txt-en">Get in touch →</span></a>
      </div>

      <div class="plat-card plat-card-featured">
        <div class="plat-card-icon">⚡</div>
        <div class="plat-card-name">Elite Access</div>
        <div class="plat-card-type"><span class="txt-fr">Accès global</span><span class="txt-en">Global access</span></div>
        <div class="plat-card-desc">
          <span class="txt-fr">50+ pays, 80+ championnats, historique complet depuis 2018-19. Accès illimité à tous les outils.</span>
          <span class="txt-en">50+ countries, 80+ leagues, full history since 2018-19. Unlimited access to all tools.</span>
        </div>
        <div class="plat-card-from"><span class="txt-fr">À partir de</span><span class="txt-en">Starting from</span></div>
        <div class="plat-card-price-main">800€ <span class="plat-card-note">HT/mois</span></div>
        <a href="#contact" class="plat-card-cta"><span class="txt-fr">Nous contacter →</span><span class="txt-en">Get in touch →</span></a>
      </div>

    </div>
    <p style="font-size:0.75rem;color:#7a8a99;font-family:var(--font-mono);margin-top:16px;text-align:center;">
      <span class="txt-fr">Engagement annuel disponible (-15%) · Simulateur de tarif disponible ci-dessous</span>
      <span class="txt-en">Annual commitment available (-15%) · Pricing simulator available below</span>
    </p>
  </div>  </div>
</section>

<!-- PROJECTION + COMPARAISON -->
<section id="projection" style="padding:100px 6%;background:#ede9e3;">
  <div class="section-tag fade-up"><span class="txt-fr">La projection</span><span class="txt-en">The projection</span></div>
  <h2 class="section-title fade-up">
    <span class="txt-fr">Avant la projection,<br>après la projection</span>
    <span class="txt-en">Before the projection,<br>after the projection</span>
  </h2>
  <p class="section-lead fade-up" style="margin-bottom:48px">
    <span class="txt-fr">Yan Diomandé dans son contexte actuel (RB Leipzig · GER1), puis projeté au PSG (FRA1). Le modèle recalcule le radar, repositionne le joueur dans la concurrence locale et révèle ce que son niveau vaudrait dans le championnat cible.</span>
    <span class="txt-en">Yan Diomandé in his current context (RB Leipzig · GER1), then projected to PSG (FRA1). The model recalculates the radar, repositions the player in local competition and reveals what his level would be worth in the target league.</span>
  </p>

  <div class="proj-before-after fade-up">
    <div class="pba-col">
      <div class="pba-label pba-label-before">
        <span class="pba-step">01</span>
        <div>
          <div class="pba-title"><span class="txt-fr">Radar & positionnement</span><span class="txt-en">Radar & positioning</span></div>
          <div class="pba-sub"><span class="txt-fr">Contexte actuel · RB Leipzig · GER1</span><span class="txt-en">Current context · RB Leipzig · GER1</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="pba-img-wrap">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Radar Leipzig GER1" class="pba-img">
        <div class="pba-img-tag pba-tag-before">GER1</div>
      </div>
      <div class="pba-points">
        <div class="pba-point"><span class="pba-dot" style="background:#5b9bd5"></span><span><span class="txt-fr">Radar vs médiane mondiale du poste (100+ championnats)</span><span class="txt-en">Radar vs worldwide position median (100+ leagues)</span></span></div>
