        <div class="pba-point"><span class="pba-dot" style="background:#5b9bd5"></span><span><span class="txt-fr">Scatter : Olise, Díaz, Uzun comme références GER1</span><span class="txt-en">Scatter: Olise, Díaz, Uzun as GER1 references</span></span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="pba-arrow">
      <div class="pba-arrow-circle">→</div>
      <div class="pba-arrow-label"><span class="txt-fr">Le modèle recalcule tout</span><span class="txt-en">The model recalculates everything</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="pba-col">
      <div class="pba-label pba-label-after">
        <span class="pba-step">02</span>
        <div>
          <div class="pba-title"><span class="txt-fr">Radar & positionnement</span><span class="txt-en">Radar & positioning</span></div>
          <div class="pba-sub"><span class="txt-fr">Contexte projeté · PSG · FRA1</span><span class="txt-en">Projected context · PSG · FRA1</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="pba-img-wrap">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Radar PSG FRA1" class="pba-img">
        <div class="pba-img-tag pba-tag-after"><span class="txt-fr">Projeté PSG</span><span class="txt-en">Projected PSG</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="pba-points">
        <div class="pba-point"><span class="pba-dot" style="background:#e8357a"></span><span><span class="txt-fr">Même radar mondial — concurrence locale FRA1 superposée</span><span class="txt-en">Same worldwide radar — FRA1 local competition overlaid</span></span></div>
        <div class="pba-point"><span class="pba-dot" style="background:#e8357a"></span><span><span class="txt-fr">Scatter : Dembélé, Barcola, Doué comme nouvelles références</span><span class="txt-en">Scatter: Dembélé, Barcola, Doué as new references</span></span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="proj-key-insight fade-up" style="margin-top:40px;">
    <div class="pki-icon">💡</div>
    <div>
      <div class="pki-title"><span class="txt-fr">Ce que la projection révèle</span><span class="txt-en">What the projection reveals</span></div>
      <div class="pki-body">
        <span class="txt-fr">Le niveau de Diomandé ne change pas — c'est son <strong>positionnement relatif dans la concurrence locale</strong> qui est recalculé. En GER1, il est face à Olise et Díaz. En FRA1, il se retrouve dans le cluster Dembélé/Barcola. Son profil est objectivement compétitif pour un transfert en L1.</span>
        <span class="txt-en">Diomandé's level doesn't change — it's his <strong>relative positioning in local competition</strong> that gets recalculated. In GER1, he faces Olise and Díaz. In FRA1, he lands in the Dembélé/Barcola cluster. His profile is objectively competitive for a Ligue 1 move.</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="proj-compare fade-up" style="margin-top:72px;">
    <div class="section-tag" style="margin-bottom:16px"><span class="txt-fr">La comparaison</span><span class="txt-en">The comparison</span></div>
    <h3 class="proj-compare-title">
      <span class="txt-fr">Yamal vs Diomandé —<br>projetés dans le même contexte</span>
      <span class="txt-en">Yamal vs Diomandé —<br>projected into the same context</span>
    </h3>
    <p style="font-size:0.95rem;color:#5a6a7a;line-height:1.75;max-width:720px;margin:16px 0 32px">
      <span class="txt-fr">L'outil permet de <strong style="color:#0d1b2e">comparer des joueurs en les projetant dans des contextes identiques</strong>. Le radar superposé et le scatter plot permettent une comparaison directe, indépendamment de leurs championnats respectifs.</span>
      <span class="txt-en">The tool allows you to <strong style="color:#0d1b2e">compare players by projecting them into identical contexts</strong>. The overlaid radar and scatter plot enable direct comparison regardless of their current leagues.</span>
    </p>
    <div class="proj-image-wrap" style="margin-bottom:24px;">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Comparaison Yamal vs Diomandé au PSG" class="proj-img">
    </div>
    <div class="proj-legend">
      <div class="proj-legend-item"><div class="plt-dot" style="background:#e8c000"></div><span><strong>Diomandé (Proj)</strong> — <span class="txt-fr">projeté au PSG</span><span class="txt-en">projected to PSG</span></span></div>
      <div class="proj-legend-item"><div class="plt-dot" style="background:#4ec9b0"></div><span><strong>Yamal 25/26</strong> — <span class="txt-fr">référence</span><span class="txt-en">reference</span></span></div>
      <div class="proj-legend-item"><div class="plt-dot" style="background:#5b9bd5"></div><span><span class="txt-fr">Top 10% FRA1</span><span class="txt-en">Top 10% FRA1</span></span></div>
      <div class="proj-legend-item"><div class="plt-dot" style="background:#aaaaaa"></div><span><span class="txt-fr">Pire 10% FRA1</span><span class="txt-en">Worst 10% FRA1</span></span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="proj-key-insight fade-up" style="margin-top:24px;">
      <div class="pki-icon">💡</div>
      <div>
        <div class="pki-title"><span class="txt-fr">Ce que ça change pour le recrutement</span><span class="txt-en">What this changes for recruitment</span></div>
        <div class="pki-body">
          <span class="txt-fr">Sans projection dans un contexte commun, comparer Diomandé (Bundesliga) et Yamal (Liga) est impossible. Football Insights les place dans le même environnement PSG — la comparaison iso-contexte révèle des différences de profil précises et actionnables.</span>
          <span class="txt-en">Without projection into a common context, comparing Diomandé (Bundesliga) and Yamal (Liga) is impossible. Football Insights places them both in the PSG environment — the iso-context comparison reveals precise, actionable profile differences.</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PLATFORM -->
<section id="platform" style="padding:100px 6%;background:#f5f2ee;">
  <div class="section-tag fade-up"><span class="txt-fr">La plateforme</span><span class="txt-en">The platform</span></div>
  <h2 class="section-title fade-up">
    <span class="txt-fr">Deux familles d'outils,<br>un seul objectif</span>
    <span class="txt-en">Two tool families,<br>one objective</span>
  </h2>
  <p class="section-lead fade-up" style="margin-bottom:64px">
    <span class="txt-fr">Football Insights combine des outils d'analyse de fiches et des outils de recherche/scouting — tous construits sur le même modèle de projection inter-championnats.</span>
    <span class="txt-en">Football Insights combines player report analysis tools and scouting/search tools — all built on the same cross-league projection model.</span>
  </p>

  <div class="platform-block fade-up">
    <div class="pb-header">
      <div class="pb-icon">📊</div>
      <div>
        <div class="pb-tag"><span class="txt-fr">Outils d'analyse</span><span class="txt-en">Analysis tools</span></div>
        <div class="pb-title"><span class="txt-fr">Comprendre et projeter un joueur</span><span class="txt-en">Understand and project a player</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="pb-tools-grid">
      <div class="pb-tool"><div class="pb-tool-icon">🎯</div><div class="pb-tool-title"><span class="txt-fr">Index de performance</span><span class="txt-en">Performance index</span></div><div class="pb-tool-desc"><span class="txt-fr">Niveau réel contextualisé par poste et championnat. Distingue niveau sans finition, avec finition et tendanciel.</span><span class="txt-en">True level contextualised by position and league. Distinguishes level without finishing, with finishing and trend.</span></div></div>
      <div class="pb-tool"><div class="pb-tool-icon">🌐</div><div class="pb-tool-title"><span class="txt-fr">Projection inter-championnats</span><span class="txt-en">Cross-league projection</span></div><div class="pb-tool-desc"><span class="txt-fr">Estimation du niveau potentiel dans n'importe quel championnat parmi 80+ ligues. Anticipe l'adaptation avant le transfert.</span><span class="txt-en">Estimated potential level in any league among 80+ competitions. Anticipates adaptation before the transfer.</span></div></div>
      <div class="pb-tool"><div class="pb-tool-icon">📡</div><div class="pb-tool-title"><span class="txt-fr">Radar contextualisé</span><span class="txt-en">Contextualised radar</span></div><div class="pb-tool-desc"><span class="txt-fr">Visualisation vs médiane mondiale du poste. Superposition de plusieurs joueurs dans un contexte commun.</span><span class="txt-en">Visualisation vs worldwide position median. Overlay of multiple players in a common context.</span></div></div>
      <div class="pb-tool"><div class="pb-tool-icon">📈</div><div class="pb-tool-title"><span class="txt-fr">Trajectoire multi-saisons</span><span class="txt-en">Multi-season trajectory</span></div><div class="pb-tool-desc"><span class="txt-fr">Évolution de l'index corrélée à l'âge. Distingue progression réelle, pic isolé et début de déclin. Historique depuis 2018-19.</span><span class="txt-en">Index evolution correlated with age. Distinguishes real progression, isolated peak and early decline. Historical data since 2018-19.</span></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="platform-block fade-up" style="margin-top:48px;">
    <div class="pb-header">
      <div class="pb-icon">🔍</div>
      <div>
        <div class="pb-tag"><span class="txt-fr">Outils de recherche & scouting</span><span class="txt-en">Search & scouting tools</span></div>
        <div class="pb-title"><span class="txt-fr">Identifier les bons profils, plus vite</span><span class="txt-en">Identify the right profiles, faster</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="pb-classic fade-up">
      <div class="pb-classic-label"><span class="txt-fr">Critères classiques</span><span class="txt-en">Standard criteria</span></div>
      <div class="pb-classic-pills">
        <span class="pb-pill"><span class="txt-fr">Âge</span><span class="txt-en">Age</span></span>
        <span class="pb-pill"><span class="txt-fr">Taille</span><span class="txt-en">Height</span></span>
        <span class="pb-pill"><span class="txt-fr">Temps de jeu</span><span class="txt-en">Playing time</span></span>
        <span class="pb-pill"><span class="txt-fr">Meilleur pied</span><span class="txt-en">Preferred foot</span></span>
        <span class="pb-pill"><span class="txt-fr">Fin de contrat</span><span class="txt-en">Contract expiry</span></span>
        <span class="pb-pill"><span class="txt-fr">Valeur marchande</span><span class="txt-en">Market value</span></span>
        <span class="pb-pill"><span class="txt-fr">Championnat / Pays</span><span class="txt-en">League / Country</span></span>
        <span class="pb-pill"><span class="txt-fr">Poste</span><span class="txt-en">Position</span></span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="pb-tools-grid" style="margin-top:24px;">
      <div class="pb-tool pb-tool-highlight"><div class="pb-tool-icon">⚡</div><div class="pb-tool-title"><span class="txt-fr">Recherche par niveau</span><span class="txt-en">Search by level</span><span class="pb-new-badge">Football Insights</span></div><div class="pb-tool-desc"><span class="txt-fr">Ciblez des joueurs selon leur statut réel : top player, titulaire, rotation ou remplaçant — dans n'importe quel championnat.</span><span class="txt-en">Target players by their real status: top player, starter, rotation or squad player — in any league.</span></div><div class="pb-tool-example"><span class="txt-fr">Ex : "Je cherche un titulaire de Ligue 2 qui serait rotation en Ligue 1"</span><span class="txt-en">E.g.: "I'm looking for a Ligue 2 starter who would be rotation in Ligue 1"</span></div></div>
      <div class="pb-tool pb-tool-highlight"><div class="pb-tool-icon">🔁</div><div class="pb-tool-title"><span class="txt-fr">Recherche par similarités</span><span class="txt-en">Search by similarity</span><span class="pb-new-badge">Football Insights</span></div><div class="pb-tool-desc"><span class="txt-fr">Trouvez un joueur "similaire à" un profil de référence dans le contexte d'un club cible. Le modèle projette le joueur de référence et sort les profils les plus proches.</span><span class="txt-en">Find a player "similar to" a reference profile in the context of a target club. The model projects the reference player and returns the closest profiles.</span></div><div class="pb-tool-example"><span class="txt-fr">Ex : "Je cherche un milieu offensif ou ailier qui aurait le même radar que Diomandé s'il évoluait en Ligue 2"</span><span class="txt-en">E.g.: "I'm looking for an attacking midfielder or winger with the same radar as Diomandé if he played in Ligue 2"</span></div></div>
      <div class="pb-tool pb-tool-highlight"><div class="pb-tool-icon">🎛️</div><div class="pb-tool-title"><span class="txt-fr">Recherche par qualités</span><span class="txt-en">Search by qualities</span><span class="pb-new-badge">Football Insights</span></div><div class="pb-tool-desc"><span class="txt-fr">Créez un profil sur mesure en sélectionnant les qualités prioritaires pour un poste donné. Le modèle retourne les joueurs qui y correspondent le plus.</span><span class="txt-en">Build a custom profile by selecting priority qualities for a given position. The model returns the players who best match it.</span></div><div class="pb-tool-example"><span class="txt-fr">Ex : "Attaquant de couloir, priorité dribble + pressing + création de passe en Liga"</span><span class="txt-en">E.g.: "Wide attacker, priority dribbling + pressing + pass creation in Liga"</span></div></div>
    </div>

    <!-- TARIFS PLATEFORME -->
    <div class="plat-pricing fade-up" style="margin-top:48px;">
      <div class="section-tag" style="margin-bottom:20px">
        <span class="txt-fr">Tarifs plateforme</span>
        <span class="txt-en">Platform pricing</span>
      </div>
      <div class="plat-cards-grid">
        <div class="plat-card">
          <div class="plat-card-icon">🎯</div>
          <div class="plat-card-name">Access</div>
          <div class="plat-card-type"><span class="txt-fr">Par championnat</span><span class="txt-en">By league</span></div>
          <div class="plat-card-desc"><span class="txt-fr">Accès aux fiches, radars, projections et historiques pour le ou les championnats sélectionnés.</span><span class="txt-en">Access to reports, radars, projections and historical data for selected leagues.</span></div>
          <div class="plat-card-from"><span class="txt-fr">À partir de</span><span class="txt-en">Starting from</span></div>
          <div class="plat-card-price-main">40€ <span class="plat-card-note">HT/mois</span></div>
          <a href="#contact" class="plat-card-cta"><span class="txt-fr">Nous contacter →</span><span class="txt-en">Get in touch →</span></a>
        </div>
        <div class="plat-card">
          <div class="plat-card-icon">🌍</div>
          <div class="plat-card-name">Regional Access</div>
          <div class="plat-card-type"><span class="txt-fr">Multi-pays</span><span class="txt-en">Multi-country</span></div>
          <div class="plat-card-desc"><span class="txt-fr">Accès illimité aux fiches et projections sur un périmètre géographique. Pays révisables à chaque renouvellement.</span><span class="txt-en">Unlimited access to reports and projections for a geographic scope. Countries revisable at each renewal.</span></div>
          <div class="plat-card-from"><span class="txt-fr">À partir de</span><span class="txt-en">Starting from</span></div>
          <div class="plat-card-price-main">250€ <span class="plat-card-note">HT/mois</span></div>
          <a href="#contact" class="plat-card-cta"><span class="txt-fr">Nous contacter →</span><span class="txt-en">Get in touch →</span></a>
        </div>
        <div class="plat-card plat-card-featured">
          <div class="plat-card-icon">⚡</div>
          <div class="plat-card-name">Elite Access</div>
          <div class="plat-card-type"><span class="txt-fr">Accès global</span><span class="txt-en">Global access</span></div>
          <div class="plat-card-desc"><span class="txt-fr">50+ pays, 80+ championnats, historique complet depuis 2018-19. Accès illimité à tous les outils.</span><span class="txt-en">50+ countries, 80+ leagues, full history since 2018-19. Unlimited access to all tools.</span></div>
          <div class="plat-card-from"><span class="txt-fr">À partir de</span><span class="txt-en">Starting from</span></div>
          <div class="plat-card-price-main">800€ <span class="plat-card-note">HT/mois</span></div>
          <a href="#contact" class="plat-card-cta"><span class="txt-fr">Nous contacter →</span><span class="txt-en">Get in touch →</span></a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <p style="font-size:0.75rem;color:#7a8a99;font-family:var(--font-mono);margin-top:16px;text-align:center;">
        <span class="txt-fr">Engagement annuel disponible (-15%) · Tarif détaillé disponible sur demande</span>
        <span class="txt-en">Annual commitment available (-15%) · Detailed pricing available on request</span>
      </p>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>

<!-- TARIFS -->
<section id="pricing" style="padding:100px 6%;background:#ede9e3;">
  <div class="section-tag fade-up"><span class="txt-fr">Nos offres</span><span class="txt-en">Our plans</span></div>
  <h2 class="section-title fade-up">
    <span class="txt-fr">Des solutions adaptées<br>à votre organisation</span>
    <span class="txt-en">Solutions built<br>for your organisation</span>
  </h2>
  <p class="section-lead fade-up" style="margin-bottom:48px">
    <span class="txt-fr">Choisissez votre périmètre, estimez votre budget — ou commencez avec le simulateur ci-dessous.</span>
    <span class="txt-en">Choose your scope, estimate your budget — or use the simulator below.</span>
  </p>

  
  <!-- Offre agences tunnel -->
  <!-- ── OFFRE AGENCES À TIROIR ── -->
  <div style="margin-top:72px" class="fade-up">
    <div class="section-tag" style="margin-bottom:16px"><span class="txt-fr">Offres agences — à la carte</span><span class="txt-en">Agency offers — à la carte</span></div>
    <h3 style="font-family:var(--font-display);font-size:1.8rem;font-weight:700;color:#0d1b2e;margin-bottom:8px;letter-spacing:0.03em;"><span class="txt-fr">Trois étapes, un processus</span><span class="txt-en">Three steps, one process</span></h3>
    <p style="font-size:0.88rem;color:#5a6a7a;max-width:600px;line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:36px;"><span class="txt-fr">Chaque étape peut se commander seule ou dans le cadre du tunnel complet.</span><span class="txt-en">Each step can be ordered alone or as part of the full tunnel.</span></p>
    <div class="tunnel-wrap">
      <div class="tunnel-step">
        <div class="tunnel-step-num">01</div>
        <div class="tunnel-step-body">
          <div class="tunnel-step-header">
            <div><div class="tunnel-step-title">Player Valuation Report</div><div class="tunnel-step-sub"><span class="txt-fr">Fiche complète + analyse concurrentielle + championnats compatibles</span><span class="txt-en">Full report + competitive analysis + compatible leagues identified</span></div></div>
            <div class="tunnel-step-price">190€ <span class="tunnel-ht">HT</span></div>
          </div>
          <div class="tunnel-step-details">
            <div class="tunnel-detail"><span class="txt-fr">📊 Index de performance contextualisé par poste et championnat</span><span class="txt-en">📊 Performance index contextualised by position and league</span></div>
            <div class="tunnel-detail"><span class="txt-fr">🎯 Analyse concurrentielle : même poste, même âge, même zone géographique</span><span class="txt-en">🎯 Competitive analysis: same position, same age, same geographic area</span></div>
            <div class="tunnel-detail"><span class="txt-fr">🌍 Identification des championnats les plus compatibles</span><span class="txt-en">🌍 Identification of the most compatible leagues</span></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="tunnel-connector"><div class="tunnel-plus">+</div></div>
      <div class="tunnel-step">
        <div class="tunnel-step-num">02</div>
        <div class="tunnel-step-body">
          <div class="tunnel-step-header">
            <div><div class="tunnel-step-title">League Targeting</div><div class="tunnel-step-sub"><span class="txt-fr">Analyse de la ligue entière — clubs compatibles au poste, concurrence interne, espace disponible</span><span class="txt-en">Full league analysis — compatible clubs at position, internal competition, available space</span></div></div>
            <div class="tunnel-step-price">+290€ <span class="tunnel-ht">HT / <span class="txt-fr">championnat</span><span class="txt-en">league</span></span></div>
          </div>
          <div class="tunnel-step-details">
            <div class="tunnel-detail"><span class="txt-fr">🔍 Scan complet de la ligue au poste ciblé</span><span class="txt-en">🔍 Full league scan at the targeted position</span></div>
            <div class="tunnel-detail"><span class="txt-fr">⚔️ Analyse de la concurrence interne dans chaque club compatible</span><span class="txt-en">⚔️ Internal competition analysis in each compatible club</span></div>
            <div class="tunnel-detail"><span class="txt-fr">📋 Shortlist des clubs les plus accessibles pour le joueur</span><span class="txt-en">📋 Shortlist of the most accessible clubs for the player</span></div>
          </div>
          <div class="tunnel-step-note"><span class="txt-fr">Plusieurs championnats → tarif multiplié · dégressif sur devis</span><span class="txt-en">Multiple leagues → tariff multiplied · volume discount on request</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="tunnel-connector"><div class="tunnel-plus">+</div></div>
      <div class="tunnel-step">
        <div class="tunnel-step-num">03</div>
        <div class="tunnel-step-body">
          <div class="tunnel-step-header">
            <div><div class="tunnel-step-title">Club Pack</div><div class="tunnel-step-sub"><span class="txt-fr">Livrables par club — présentation détaillée prête à envoyer (5 clubs max)</span><span class="txt-en">Per-club deliverables — detailed presentation ready to send (5 clubs max)</span></div></div>
            <div class="tunnel-step-price">+120€ <span class="tunnel-ht">HT / <span class="txt-fr">club</span><span class="txt-en">club</span></span></div>
          </div>
          <div class="tunnel-step-details">
            <div class="tunnel-detail"><span class="txt-fr">📁 Projection du joueur dans le contexte exact du club</span><span class="txt-en">📁 Player projected into the exact club context</span></div>
            <div class="tunnel-detail"><span class="txt-fr">📡 Radar comparé à la concurrence interne au poste</span><span class="txt-en">📡 Radar compared to internal competition at the position</span></div>
            <div class="tunnel-detail"><span class="txt-fr">✉️ Dossier structuré, prêt à être transmis au club</span><span class="txt-en">✉️ Structured dossier, ready to be sent to the club</span></div>
          </div>
          <div class="tunnel-step-note"><span class="txt-fr">3 clubs → 300€ HT · 5 clubs → 450€ HT · One-shot sans étapes 1&2 → 310€ HT / club</span><span class="txt-en">3 clubs → €300 excl. VAT · 5 clubs → €450 excl. VAT · One-shot without steps 1&2 → €310 / club</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="tunnel-total">
        <div class="tunnel-total-label"><span class="txt-fr">Tunnel complet — exemples</span><span class="txt-en">Full tunnel — examples</span></div>
        <div class="tunnel-total-examples">
          <div class="tunnel-example"><span class="tunnel-example-desc"><span class="txt-fr">Étape 1 + 1 championnat + 3 clubs</span><span class="txt-en">Step 1 + 1 league + 3 clubs</span></span><span class="tunnel-example-price">780€ HT</span></div>
          <div class="tunnel-example"><span class="tunnel-example-desc"><span class="txt-fr">Étape 1 + 2 championnats + 5 clubs</span><span class="txt-en">Step 1 + 2 leagues + 5 clubs</span></span><span class="tunnel-example-price">1 220€ HT</span></div>
        </div>
        <a href="#contact" class="btn-primary" style="display:inline-block;margin-top:20px;font-size:0.78rem;padding:12px 28px;"><span class="txt-fr">Discuter de mon projet →</span><span class="txt-en">Discuss my project →</span></a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>


  <!-- Offre clubs -->
  <div style="margin-top:72px" class="fade-up">
    <div class="section-tag" style="margin-bottom:16px">
      <span class="txt-fr">Offres clubs — à la carte</span>
      <span class="txt-en">Club offers — à la carte</span>
    </div>
    <h3 style="font-family:var(--font-display);font-size:1.8rem;font-weight:700;color:#0d1b2e;margin-bottom:8px;letter-spacing:0.03em;">
      <span class="txt-fr">Deux niveaux d'accompagnement</span>
      <span class="txt-en">Two levels of support</span>
    </h3>
    <p style="font-size:0.88rem;color:#5a6a7a;max-width:600px;line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:36px;">
      <span class="txt-fr">Du besoin ponctuel en période de mercato à l'intégration complète de Football Insights dans votre cellule de recrutement.</span>
      <span class="txt-en">From one-off needs during transfer windows to the full integration of Football Insights into your recruitment structure.</span>
    </p>

    <div class="tunnel-wrap">

      <!-- Offre 1 : Liste scouting -->
      <div class="tunnel-step">
        <div class="tunnel-step-num">01</div>
        <div class="tunnel-step-body">
          <div class="tunnel-step-header">
            <div>
              <div class="tunnel-step-title"><span class="txt-fr">Liste scouting</span><span class="txt-en">Scouting list</span></div>
              <div class="tunnel-step-sub">
                <span class="txt-fr">Sélection de profils contextualisés selon vos critères — prête à partager avec vos équipes</span>
                <span class="txt-en">Contextualised profile selection based on your criteria — ready to share with your team</span>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="tunnel-step-price">250€ <span class="tunnel-ht">HT / <span class="txt-fr">liste</span><span class="txt-en">list</span></span></div>
          </div>
          <div class="tunnel-step-details">
            <div class="tunnel-detail">
              <span class="txt-fr">📋 Critères personnalisés : poste, âge, niveau, budget, ligues cibles</span>
              <span class="txt-en">📋 Custom criteria: position, age, level, budget, target leagues</span>
            </div>
            <div class="tunnel-detail">
              <span class="txt-fr">📊 Fiches Football Insights complètes pour chaque profil (index, radar, projection)</span>
              <span class="txt-en">📊 Full Football Insights reports for each profile (index, radar, projection)</span>
            </div>
            <div class="tunnel-detail">
              <span class="txt-fr">📁 Format PDF ou Excel prêt à partager</span>
              <span class="txt-en">📁 PDF or Excel format ready to share</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="tunnel-step-note">
            <span class="txt-fr">Dégressif : 2 listes → 450€ HT · 3 listes → 600€ HT · Au-delà → sur devis</span>
            <span class="txt-en">Volume discount: 2 lists → €450 excl. VAT · 3 lists → €600 excl. VAT · Beyond → on request</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="tunnel-connector"><div class="tunnel-plus">↑</div></div>

      <!-- Offre 2 : Intégration cellule -->
      <div class="tunnel-step">
        <div class="tunnel-step-num">02</div>
        <div class="tunnel-step-body">
          <div class="tunnel-step-header">
            <div>
              <div class="tunnel-step-title">
                <span class="txt-fr">Intégration cellule recrutement</span>
                <span class="txt-en">Recruitment structure integration</span>
              </div>
              <div class="tunnel-step-sub">
                <span class="txt-fr">Mise à disposition de la plateforme, création d'outils adaptés à vos processus et accompagnement de votre organisation</span>
                <span class="txt-en">Platform deployment, creation of tools adapted to your processes and support for your organisation</span>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="tunnel-step-price" style="font-size:1.2rem;">
              <span class="txt-fr">Sur devis</span>
              <span class="txt-en">On request</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="tunnel-step-details">
            <div class="tunnel-detail">
              <span class="txt-fr">⚙️ Accès plateforme configuré selon votre périmètre (championnats, pays)</span>
              <span class="txt-en">⚙️ Platform access configured to your scope (leagues, countries)</span>
            </div>
            <div class="tunnel-detail">
              <span class="txt-fr">🛠️ Création d'outils et de workflows adaptés à vos processus de recrutement internes</span>
              <span class="txt-en">🛠️ Creation of tools and workflows adapted to your internal recruitment processes</span>
            </div>
            <div class="tunnel-detail">
              <span class="txt-fr">🎓 Formation de votre staff aux outils Football Insights</span>
              <span class="txt-en">🎓 Training of your staff on Football Insights tools</span>
            </div>
            <div class="tunnel-detail">
              <span class="txt-fr">📞 Accompagnement stratégique continu et analyses spécifiques sur demande</span>
              <span class="txt-en">📞 Ongoing strategic support and specific analyses on request</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="tunnel-step-note">
            <span class="txt-fr">Tarif selon le périmètre, la taille de l'organisation et le niveau d'accompagnement souhaité.</span>
            <span class="txt-en">Pricing based on scope, organisation size and desired level of support.</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="tunnel-total">
        <div class="tunnel-total-label">
          <span class="txt-fr">Vous ne savez pas par où commencer ?</span>
          <span class="txt-en">Not sure where to start?</span>
        </div>
        <div style="font-size:0.88rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:16px;">
          <span class="txt-fr">Commencez par le Club Starter Pack (149€) — audit d'un poste + 5 cibles + visio. C'est le meilleur moyen de découvrir Football Insights sur un cas concret avant de structurer un accompagnement plus large.</span>
          <span class="txt-en">Start with the Club Starter Pack (€149) — position audit + 5 targets + video call. It's the best way to discover Football Insights on a concrete case before structuring broader support.</span>
        </div>
        <a href="#contact" class="btn-primary" style="display:inline-block;font-size:0.78rem;padding:12px 28px;">
          <span class="txt-fr">Discuter de mon organisation →</span>
          <span class="txt-en">Discuss my organisation →</span>
        </a>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>


  <!-- Agency Starter Pack -->
  <div style="margin-top:48px" class="fade-up">
    <div class="starter-pack">
      <div class="sp-badge"><span class="txt-fr">Offre limitée · Agences</span><span class="txt-en">Limited offer · Agencies</span></div>
      <div class="sp-layout">
        <div class="sp-left">
          <div class="sp-title">Agency Starter Pack</div>
          <div class="sp-tagline"><span class="txt-fr">Testez Football Insights sur vos vrais joueurs, sans engagement.</span><span class="txt-en">Try Football Insights on your actual players, no commitment.</span></div>
          <div class="sp-includes">
            <div class="sp-item"><div class="sp-item-icon">⚡</div><div><div class="sp-item-title"><span class="txt-fr">10 fiches joueurs offertes</span><span class="txt-en">10 player reports included</span></div><div class="sp-item-desc"><span class="txt-fr">Index, radar, projection inter-championnats, historique multi-saisons.</span><span class="txt-en">Index, radar, cross-league projection, multi-season history.</span></div></div></div>
            <div class="sp-item"><div class="sp-item-icon">📊</div><div><div class="sp-item-title">1 Player Valuation Report <span class="sp-tag-reduced"><span class="txt-fr">tarif réduit</span><span class="txt-en">reduced price</span></span></div><div class="sp-item-desc"><span class="txt-fr">Analyse complète d'un joueur de votre portefeuille.</span><span class="txt-en">Full analysis of one of your players.</span></div></div></div>
            <div class="sp-item"><div class="sp-item-icon">🎯</div><div><div class="sp-item-title"><span class="txt-fr">Visio de démo personnalisée</span><span class="txt-en">Personalised onboarding call</span></div><div class="sp-item-desc"><span class="txt-fr">Débrief sur vos joueurs, prise en main de la plateforme.</span><span class="txt-en">Debrief on your players, platform walkthrough.</span></div></div></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="sp-right">
          <div class="sp-value-line"><span class="txt-fr">Valeur réelle</span><span class="txt-en">Real value</span> <span class="sp-strikethrough">290€</span></div>
          <div class="sp-price">149€ <span class="sp-ht">HT</span></div>
          <div class="sp-price-sub"><span class="txt-fr">one-shot · sans engagement</span><span class="txt-en">one-off · no commitment</span></div>
          <a href="#contact" class="btn-primary" style="display:inline-block;margin-top:24px;font-size:0.78rem;padding:13px 28px;width:100%;text-align:center;box-sizing:border-box;"><span class="txt-fr">Demander l'offre →</span><span class="txt-en">Request the offer →</span></a>
          <div class="sp-note"><span class="txt-fr">* Conditionné à la visio de débrief finale.</span><span class="txt-en">* Subject to final debrief call.</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>


  <!-- Club Starter Pack -->
  <div style="margin-top:24px" class="fade-up">
    <div class="starter-pack" style="--sp-accent:#8b3fc8;">
      <div class="sp-badge" style="background:rgba(139,63,200,0.12);border-color:rgba(139,63,200,0.35);color:#b07ef5;"><span class="txt-fr">Offre limitée · Clubs</span><span class="txt-en">Limited offer · Clubs</span></div>
      <div class="sp-layout">
        <div class="sp-left">
          <div class="sp-title">Club Starter Pack</div>
          <div class="sp-tagline"><span class="txt-fr">Un audit de poste concret sur votre marché, livré clé en main.</span><span class="txt-en">A concrete position audit on your market, delivered ready to use.</span></div>
          <div class="sp-includes">
            <div class="sp-item"><div class="sp-item-icon">🔎</div><div><div class="sp-item-title"><span class="txt-fr">1 audit de poste au choix</span><span class="txt-en">1 position audit of your choice</span></div><div class="sp-item-desc"><span class="txt-fr">Analyse de la concurrence sur le poste ciblé : niveau réel, trajectoires, disponibilités.</span><span class="txt-en">Competition analysis on the targeted position: true level, trajectories, availability.</span></div></div></div>
            <div class="sp-item"><div class="sp-item-icon">⚽</div><div><div class="sp-item-title"><span class="txt-fr">5 cibles sélectionnées</span><span class="txt-en">5 targeted profiles</span><span class="sp-tag-reduced" style="background:rgba(139,63,200,0.15);border-color:rgba(139,63,200,0.3);color:#b07ef5;"><span class="txt-fr">même pays ou limitrophes</span><span class="txt-en">same or neighbouring countries</span></span></div><div class="sp-item-desc"><span class="txt-fr">Profils identifiés dans le même pays ou les pays limitrophes, avec fiches Football Insights complètes.</span><span class="txt-en">Profiles identified in the same country or neighbouring countries, with full Football Insights reports.</span></div></div></div>
            <div class="sp-item"><div class="sp-item-icon">🎯</div><div><div class="sp-item-title"><span class="txt-fr">Visio de débrief + embarquement</span><span class="txt-en">Debrief call + onboarding</span></div><div class="sp-item-desc"><span class="txt-fr">Présentation des 5 cibles, prise en main de la plateforme.</span><span class="txt-en">Presentation of the 5 targets, platform walkthrough.</span></div></div></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="sp-right" style="border-color:rgba(139,63,200,0.2);">
          <div class="sp-value-line"><span class="txt-fr">Valeur réelle</span><span class="txt-en">Real value</span> <span class="sp-strikethrough">250€+</span></div>
          <div class="sp-price">149€ <span class="sp-ht">HT</span></div>
          <div class="sp-price-sub"><span class="txt-fr">one-shot · sans engagement</span><span class="txt-en">one-off · no commitment</span></div>
          <a href="#contact" class="btn-primary" style="display:inline-block;margin-top:24px;font-size:0.78rem;padding:13px 28px;width:100%;text-align:center;box-sizing:border-box;"><span class="txt-fr">Demander l'offre →</span><span class="txt-en">Request the offer →</span></a>
          <div class="sp-note"><span class="txt-fr">* Conditionné à la visio de débrief finale.</span><span class="txt-en">* Subject to final debrief call.</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</section>
<!-- CONTACT -->
<section id="contact" style="padding:100px 6%;background:#f5f2ee;">
  <div class="section-tag fade-up">Contact</div>
  <h2 class="section-title fade-up">
    <span class="txt-fr">Parlons de votre organisation</span>
    <span class="txt-en">Let's discuss your organisation</span>
  </h2>
  <p class="section-lead fade-up" style="margin-bottom:48px">
    <span class="txt-fr">Venez échanger sur votre organisation et découvrir comment Football Insights peut s'intégrer à votre structure.</span>
    <span class="txt-en">Let's discuss your organisation and explore how Football Insights can integrate into your structure.</span>
  </p>

  <div class="contact-form-wrap fade-up">
    <form action="https://formspree.io/f/mojkowkd" method="POST" class="contact-form">
      <div class="form-row">
        <div class="form-group">
          <label><span class="txt-fr">Prénom</span><span class="txt-en">First name</span></label>
          <input type="text" name="prénom" placeholder="Florent" required>
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label><span class="txt-fr">Nom</span><span class="txt-en">Last name</span></label>
          <input type="text" name="nom" placeholder="Toniutti" required>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label>Email</label>
        <input type="email" name="email" placeholder="contact@exemple.com" required>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label><span class="txt-fr">Organisation</span><span class="txt-en">Organisation</span></label>
        <input type="text" name="organisation" placeholder="FC Bordeaux">
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label><span class="txt-fr">Vous êtes…</span><span class="txt-en">You are…</span></label>
        <select name="profil">
          <option value="" disabled selected>–</option>
          <option value="club"><span class="txt-fr">Un club professionnel</span><span class="txt-en">A professional club</span></option>
          <option value="agence"><span class="txt-fr">Un agent / agence</span><span class="txt-en">An agent / agency</span></option>
          <option value="autre"><span class="txt-fr">Autre</span><span class="txt-en">Other</span></option>
        </select>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label>Message</label>
        <textarea name="message" placeholder="..." rows="5"></textarea>
      </div>
      <button type="submit" class="btn-submit">
        <span class="txt-fr">Envoyer →</span>
        <span class="txt-en">Send →</span>
      </button>
    </form>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <div>
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Football Insights" style="width:72px;height:72px;object-fit:contain;">
    <div class="footer-tagline">Scout · Project · Decide</div>
  </div>
  <div class="footer-links">
    <a href="#problems"><span class="txt-fr">Enjeux</span><span class="txt-en">Challenges</span></a>
    <a href="#how"><span class="txt-fr">Méthode</span><span class="txt-en">Method</span></a>
    <a href="#pricing"><span class="txt-fr">Tarifs</span><span class="txt-en">Pricing</span></a>
    <a href="#contact">Contact</a>
  </div>
  <div style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:0.68rem;color:rgba(138,154,181,0.4)">© 2026 Football Insights</div>
</footer>

<script>
// Language toggle
function setLang(lang) {
  document.body.className = 'lang-' + lang;
  document.querySelectorAll('.lang-toggle button').forEach((btn, i) => {
    btn.classList.toggle('active', (lang === 'fr' && i === 0) || (lang === 'en' && i === 1));
  });
  // update scope label visibility
  document.getElementById('sim-scope-label-fr').style.display = lang === 'fr' ? '' : 'none';
  document.getElementById('sim-scope-label-en').style.display = lang === 'en' ? '' : 'none';
  simUpdate();
}

// ── SIMULATOR ──
const SIM = {
  profil: 'club',
  type: 'leagues',
  scope: 1,
  reports: 1,
  advanced: false,
  annual: false
};

// leagues prices per number (1-5)
const LEAGUE_PRICES = [40, 75, 110, 140, 170];
// countries prices: 5,10,15,20 → index 0-3
const COUNTRY_SCOPES = [5, 10, 15, 20];
const COUNTRY_PRICES = [250, 350, 450, 600];
const REPORT_PRICES = { 1: 20, 10: 180, 25: 375 };

function simSelect(btn, group) {
  document.querySelectorAll('#sim-' + group + ' .sim-pill').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
  SIM[group] = btn.dataset.val;
  simUpdate();
}

function simUpdate() {
  const sliderEl = document.getElementById('sim-slider'); if (!sliderEl) return;
  SIM.scope = parseInt(sliderEl.value);
  SIM.reports = parseInt(document.querySelector('#sim-reports .sim-pill.active')?.dataset.val || 1);
  SIM.advanced = document.getElementById('opt-advanced').checked;
  SIM.annual = document.getElementById('opt-annual').checked;

  const isFr = !document.body.classList.contains('lang-en');
  const type = SIM.type;

  // show/hide steps
  const scopeStep = document.getElementById('sim-step-scope');
  const reportStep = document.getElementById('sim-step-reports');
  const optStep = document.getElementById('sim-step-options');
  const annualWrap = document.getElementById('opt-annual-wrap');

  scopeStep.style.display = (type === 'leagues' || type === 'countries') ? '' : 'none';
  reportStep.style.display = type === 'oneshot' ? '' : 'none';
  optStep.style.display = type !== 'oneshot' ? '' : 'none';
  annualWrap.style.display = (type === 'leagues' || type === 'countries') ? '' : 'none';

  // configure slider for countries vs leagues
  const slider = document.getElementById('sim-slider');
  const ticks = document.getElementById('sim-ticks');
  let tickLabels = [];

  if (type === 'countries') {
    slider.min = 0; slider.max = 3;
    if (SIM.scope > 3) { SIM.scope = 0; slider.value = 0; }
    tickLabels = ['5 pays', '10 pays', '15 pays', '20 pays'];
    document.getElementById('sim-scope-label-fr').textContent = 'Nombre de pays';
    document.getElementById('sim-scope-label-en').textContent = 'Number of countries';
  } else {
    slider.min = 1; slider.max = 5;
    tickLabels = ['1', '2', '3', '4', '5'];
    document.getElementById('sim-scope-label-fr').textContent = 'Nombre de championnats';
    document.getElementById('sim-scope-label-en').textContent = 'Number of leagues';
  }

  // rebuild ticks
  ticks.innerHTML = '';
  const val = parseInt(slider.value);
  tickLabels.forEach((label, i) => {
    const idx = type === 'leagues' ? i + 1 : i;
    const d = document.createElement('div');
    d.className = 'sim-tick' + (idx === val ? ' active' : '');
    d.textContent = label;
    ticks.appendChild(d);
  });

  // compute price
  let base = 0, planName = '', planDesc = '';
  const scope = parseInt(slider.value);

  if (type === 'leagues') {
    base = LEAGUE_PRICES[Math.min(scope, 5) - 1];
    planName = isFr ? `Access · ${scope} championnat${scope > 1 ? 's' : ''}` : `Access · ${scope} league${scope > 1 ? 's' : ''}`;
    planDesc = isFr
      ? `Accès complet aux fiches, radars, projections et historiques (depuis 2018-19) pour ${scope} championnat${scope > 1 ? 's' : ''} de votre choix.`
      : `Full access to reports, radars, projections and historical data (since 2018-19) for ${scope} league${scope > 1 ? 's' : ''} of your choice.`;
  } else if (type === 'countries') {
    base = COUNTRY_PRICES[Math.min(scope, 3)];
    const n = COUNTRY_SCOPES[Math.min(scope, 3)];
    planName = isFr ? `Access Multi-pays · ${n} pays` : `Multi-country Access · ${n} countries`;
    planDesc = isFr
      ? `Accès illimité aux fiches, radars, projections et historiques pour ${n} pays. Pays révisables à chaque renouvellement.`
      : `Unlimited access to reports, radars, projections and history for ${n} countries. Countries can be revised at each renewal.`;
  } else if (type === 'elite') {
    base = 800;
    planName = 'Elite Access';
    planDesc = isFr
      ? 'Accès global : 50+ pays, 80+ championnats, index, radars, projections et historique complet depuis 2018-19.'
      : 'Global access: 50+ countries, 80+ leagues, index, radars, projections and full historical data since 2018-19.';
  } else if (type === 'oneshot') {
    const r = SIM.reports;
    base = REPORT_PRICES[r] || 20;
    planName = r === 1 ? (isFr ? '1 fiche joueur' : '1 player report') : `Pack ${r} ${isFr ? 'fiches' : 'reports'}`;
    planDesc = isFr
      ? `Fiche automatisée Football Insights : index de performance, radar, projection inter-championnats, comparaisons. ${r > 1 ? `Offre découverte limitée à 25 fiches/an/organisation.` : ''}`
      : `Automated Football Insights report: performance index, radar, cross-league projection, comparisons. ${r > 1 ? `Discovery offer limited to 25 reports/year/organisation.` : ''}`;
  }

  if (SIM.advanced && type !== 'oneshot') base += 200;
  let priceDisplay = '', annualDisplay = '';

  if (type === 'oneshot') {
    priceDisplay = `${base}€ <span class="sim-price-period">HT</span>`;
    annualDisplay = '';
  } else if (SIM.annual && (type === 'leagues' || type === 'countries')) {
    const annual = Math.round(base * 12 * 0.85);
    priceDisplay = `${annual}€ <span class="sim-price-period">${isFr ? 'HT/an' : 'ex.VAT/yr'}</span>`;
    annualDisplay = isFr ? `soit ${Math.round(annual/12)}€/mois — économisez 15%` : `i.e. €${Math.round(annual/12)}/month — save 15%`;
  } else {
    priceDisplay = `${base}€ <span class="sim-price-period">${isFr ? 'HT/mois' : 'ex.VAT/mo'}</span>`;
    if (type === 'leagues' || type === 'countries') {
      const annual = Math.round(base * 12 * 0.85);
      annualDisplay = isFr ? `→ ${annual}€/an avec engagement annuel (-15%)` : `→ €${annual}/yr with annual commitment (-15%)`;
    }
  }

  document.getElementById('sim-plan-name').textContent = planName;
  document.getElementById('sim-plan-desc').textContent = planDesc;
  document.getElementById('sim-price').innerHTML = priceDisplay;
  document.getElementById('sim-annual').textContent = annualDisplay;
}

// init simulator
if (document.getElementById('sim-slider')) { simUpdate(); }

const FI_DATA = {
  profile: {
    tag_fr: "Profil joueur", tag_en: "Player profile",
    title_fr: "Le contexte avant tout", title_en: "Context first",
    body_fr: "Le profil regroupe les informations essentielles : poste, équipe, âge, pied, valeur marchande TM et salaire. Ces données contextualisent toute l'analyse — Michael Olise a 24 ans, joue au Bayern München, joue au Bayern München. Son âge et son club sont centraux : un index de 82 à 24 ans dans le meilleur championnat du monde a une tout autre portée qu'ailleurs.",
    body_en: "The profile gathers essential information: position, team, age, foot, TM market value and salary. These data contextualise the entire analysis — Michael Olise is 24, plays at Bayern München, worth €130M. His age is central: an index of 82 at 24 in the world's best league means something very different than elsewhere.",
    insight_fr: "24 ans · MOD · Bayern München · 10 buts et 17 passes décisives en 24 matches. Un profil d'élite mondiale à pleine maturité précoce — c'est exactement ce que l'index Football Insights permet de confirmer objectivement.",
    insight_en: "24 years old · MOD · Bayern München · 10 goals and 17 assists in 24 matches. A world-elite profile at early full maturity — exactly what the Football Insights index objectively confirms."
  },
  stats: {
    tag_fr: "Statistiques clés", tag_en: "Key stats",
    title_fr: "Forces et faiblesses en un coup d'œil", title_en: "Strengths and weaknesses at a glance",
    body_fr: "Les statistiques clés identifient les points forts et les axes de faiblesse du joueur via un classement en percentile parmi tous les joueurs à son poste sur 100+ championnats. Les barres vertes représentent les meilleures stats (top %), les barres sombres les pires (pire %). Cette lecture immédiate permet de comprendre le profil sans rentrer dans les chiffres bruts.",
    body_en: "Key stats identify the player's strengths and weaknesses via percentile ranking among all players at his position across 100+ leagues. Green bars represent top stats (top %), dark bars the worst (worst %). This immediate reading allows you to understand the profile without diving into raw numbers.",
    insight_fr: "Olise est dans le top 0% pour les passes clés et passes décisives par 90 — une domination absolue sur la création offensive. Ses pires stats (duels aériens, duels défensifs) confirment son profil de créateur pur, à protéger défensivement.",
    insight_en: "Olise is in the top 0% for key passes and assists per 90 — absolute dominance on offensive creation. His worst stats (aerial duels, defensive duels) confirm his profile as a pure creator who needs defensive cover."
  },
  index: {
    tag_fr: "Index de performance", tag_en: "Performance index",
    title_fr: "Possible Ballon d'Or — l'index le confirme", title_en: "True level — the index confirms it",
    body_fr: "L'index Football Insights distingue trois niveaux : sans finition (82.7 — le niveau de jeu pur, indépendant des buts), avec finition (84.7 — son efficacité offensive exceptionnelle) et tendanciel (84.5 — sa trajectoire récente, encore en hausse). Un index de 82+ sans finition le place dans le top 5 mondial. La courbe de trajectoire de 18 à 24 ans montre une progression continue et stable — aucun pic isolé.",
    body_en: "The Football Insights index distinguishes three levels: without finishing (82.7 — pure playing level, independent of goals), with finishing (84.7 — exceptional offensive efficiency) and trend (84.5 — recent trajectory, still rising). An index of 82+ without finishing places him in the world top 5. The trajectory curve from 18 to 24 shows continuous, stable progression — no isolated peak.",
    insight_fr: "82.7 sans finition, 84.7 avec — les deux valeurs sont proches et élevées : Olise est excellent dans tous les aspects du jeu offensif. Sa trajectoire tendancielle à 84.5 confirme qu'il est au sommet de sa forme actuelle.",
    insight_en: "82.7 without finishing, 84.7 with — both values are high and close: Olise excels in every aspect of offensive play. His trend level at 84.5 confirms he is at the peak of his current form."
  },
  radar: {
    tag_fr: "Radar contextualisé", tag_en: "Contextualised radar",
    title_fr: "Un profil qui écrase la médiane mondiale", title_en: "A profile that dominates the worldwide median",
    body_fr: "Le radar Football Insights compare le joueur à la médiane mondiale de son poste — calculée sur 100+ championnats depuis 2018-19. Ce n'est pas une comparaison locale : Olise est mesuré face à tous les milieux offensifs du monde. La surface verte représente son profil, superposée à la médiane MO (jaune) et aux seuils top/pire 10%.",
    body_en: "The Football Insights radar compares the player to the worldwide position median — calculated across 100+ leagues since 2018-19. This is not a local comparison: Olise is measured against all offensive midfielders in the world. The green surface represents his profile, overlaid on the MO median (yellow) and top/worst 10% thresholds.",
    insight_fr: "Olise dépasse massivement la médiane mondiale sur tous les axes — passes clés, pressing, récupération, conservation, construction, dribble. C'est l'un des radars les plus complets observés sur 100+ championnats. Similaire statistiquement à Lamine Yamal et L. Sané.",
    insight_en: "Olise massively exceeds the worldwide median on every single axis — key passes, pressing, recovery, ball retention, construction, dribbling. One of the most complete radars observed across 100+ leagues. Similar to Lamine Yamal and L. Sané."
  },
  scatter: {
    tag_fr: "Scatter plot — Positionnement marché", tag_en: "Scatter plot — Market positioning",
    title_fr: "Seul dans sa catégorie en GER1", title_en: "Alone in his category in GER1",
    body_fr: "Le scatter plot positionne Olise parmi tous les joueurs à un poste similaire en GER1 sur deux axes : percentile radar (qualité globale du profil) et percentile d'impact estimé (contribution au résultat collectif). Un joueur en haut à droite combine un excellent profil ET un fort impact — c'est l'indicateur le plus fiable de la valeur réelle d'un joueur.",
    body_en: "The scatter plot positions Olise among all players at a similar position in GER1 on two axes: radar percentile (overall profile quality) and estimated impact percentile (contribution to team results). A player top-right combines excellent profile AND high impact — the most reliable indicator of a player's real value.",
    insight_fr: "Olise est seul dans le coin supérieur droit du scatter GER1 — aucun autre joueur à son poste ne combine ce niveau de profil et d'impact. Díaz et Diomandé sont ses concurrents les plus proches, mais nettement derrière. Ce positionnement objectif est la base d'argumentation pour orienter les décisions de recrutement.",
    insight_en: "Olise is alone in the top-right corner of the GER1 scatter — no other player at his position combines this level of profile and impact. Díaz and Diomandé are his closest rivals, but significantly behind. This objective positioning supports informed recruitment decisions."
  },
  similar: {
    tag_fr: "Similarités statistiques", tag_en: "Statistical similarities",
    title_fr: "Lamine Yamal, Sané, D. Man — ses pairs statistiques", title_en: "Lamine Yamal, Sané, D. Man — his statistical peers",
    body_fr: "Le moteur de similarité identifie les joueurs au profil statistique le plus proche — pas seulement le poste, mais la façon de jouer : volume créatif, patterns de passe, impact offensif direct. Pour Olise, les similaires sont tous des joueurs de premier plan européen.",
    body_en: "The similarity engine identifies players with the closest statistical profile — not just position, but playing style: creative volume, passing patterns, direct offensive impact. For Olise, the similars are all leading European players.",
    insight_fr: "Olise est statistiquement similaire à Lamine Yamal (Barcelona), Leroy Sané (Galatasaray) et D. Man (PSV) — trois attaquants/milieux offensifs créatifs à très haut volume de passes clés.",
    insight_en: "Olise is statistically similar to Lamine Yamal (Barcelona), Leroy Sané (Galatasaray) and D. Man (PSV) — three creative attacking midfielders with very high key pass volume."
  }
};

function fiSelect(key) {
  const isFr = !document.body.classList.contains('lang-en');
  const d = FI_DATA[key];
  if (!d) return;
  document.querySelectorAll('.fi-block, .vf-hotspot').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  const block = document.getElementById('fb-' + key);
  if (block) block.classList.add('active');
  const hs = document.querySelectorAll('.vf-hotspot');
  const keyMap = {profile:0, stats:1, index:2, similar:3, radar:4, scatter:5};
  if (hs[keyMap[key]]) hs[keyMap[key]].classList.add('active');
  document.getElementById('fi-default').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('fi-content').style.display = 'block';
  document.getElementById('fi-tag').innerHTML = isFr ? d.tag_fr : d.tag_en;
  document.getElementById('fi-title').innerHTML = isFr ? d.title_fr : d.title_en;
  document.getElementById('fi-body').innerHTML = isFr ? d.body_fr : d.body_en;
  document.getElementById('fi-insight').innerHTML = isFr ? d.insight_fr : d.insight_en;
  if (window.innerWidth < 900) {
    document.getElementById('fi-explain').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth', block:'nearest'});
  }
}

const VF_DATA = {
  profile: {
    tag_fr: "Profil joueur", tag_en: "Player profile",
    title_fr: "Le contexte avant tout", title_en: "Context first",
    body_fr: "Le profil regroupe les informations essentielles : poste, équipe actuelle, âge, pied, valeur marchande TM et salaire. Ces données sont centrales — Yan Diomandé a 19 ans, joue à RB Leipzig, joue à RB Leipzig. Son âge est central : un index de 70 à 19 ans a une tout autre signification qu'à 26 ans.",
    body_en: "The profile gathers essential information: position, current team, age, foot, TM market value and annual salary. These data contextualise the entire analysis — Yan Diomandé is 19, plays at RB Leipzig, plays at RB Leipzig. His age is central: an index of 70 at 19 means something very different than at 26.",
    insight_fr: "19 ans · ATD/ATG · RB Leipzig · 10 buts et 5 passes décisives en 25 matches cette saison. Un profil élite déjà mature, rare à cet âge.",
    insight_en: "19 years old · RWF/LWF · RB Leipzig · 10 goals and 5 assists in 25 matches this season. An already mature elite profile, rare at this age."
  },
  index: {
    tag_fr: "Index de performance", tag_en: "Performance index",
    title_fr: "Star mondiale — top 5 à son poste", title_en: "World star — top 5 at his position",
    body_fr: "L'index distingue trois niveaux : sans finition (70.3 — le plus fiable), avec finition (77.5 — boosté par son efficacité offensive) et tendanciel (70.4 — trajectoire stable). L'écart entre 70.3 et 77.5 montre qu'il est aussi un finisseur exceptionnel.",
    body_en: "The index distinguishes three levels: without finishing (70.3 — most reliable), with finishing (77.5 — boosted by offensive efficiency) and trend (70.4 — stable trajectory). The gap between 70.3 and 77.5 shows he is also an exceptional finisher.",
    insight_fr: "Un index de 70+ sans finition à 19 ans le place dans le top 5 mondial à son poste. La trajectoire tendancielle stable à 70.4 confirme que ce n'est pas un pic isolé.",
    insight_en: "An index above 70 without finishing at 19 places him in the world top 5 at his position. The stable trend level at 70.4 confirms this is not an isolated peak."
  },
  radar: {
    tag_fr: "Radar & projection PSG", tag_en: "Radar & PSG projection",
    title_fr: "Comment son profil se traduit dans l'élite", title_en: "How his profile translates to the elite",
    body_fr: "Le radar compare Diomandé (projeté au PSG) à la médiane mondiale des attaquants, au top 10% et au pire 10%. La surface verte représente son profil projeté — elle dépasse largement la médiane sur la conservation de balle, le pressing et la récupération.",
    body_en: "The radar compares Diomandé (projected to PSG) to the worldwide attacker median, top 10% and worst 10%. The green surface represents his projected profile — it largely exceeds the median on ball retention, pressing and recovery.",
    insight_fr: "Projeté au PSG, Diomandé dépasse la médiane des attaquants de L1 sur quasiment tous les axes. Comparable à Dembélé et Barcola dans l'environnement FRA1.",
    insight_en: "Projected to PSG, Diomandé exceeds the L1 attacker median on almost every dimension. Comparable to Dembélé and Barcola in the FRA1 environment."
  },
  trajectory: {
    tag_fr: "Similarités statistiques", tag_en: "Statistical similarities",
    title_fr: "Comprendre le joueur par ses pairs", title_en: "Understanding through peers",
    body_fr: "Le moteur de similarité identifie les joueurs au profil statistique le plus proche : volume progressif, patterns offensifs, impact sur le jeu.",
    body_en: "The similarity engine identifies players with the closest statistical profile: progressive volume, offensive patterns, game impact.",
    insight_fr: "Diomandé est statistiquement similaire à Rodrigo Zalazar (Sporting Braga), Mason Greenwood (OM) et Kingsley Coman (Al Nassr).",
    insight_en: "Diomandé is statistically similar to Rodrigo Zalazar (Sporting Braga), Mason Greenwood (OM) and Kingsley Coman (Al Nassr)."
  },
  scatter: {
    tag_fr: "Positionnement marché", tag_en: "Market positioning",
    title_fr: "Sa position parmi l'élite de son poste", title_en: "His position among the elite at his position",
    body_fr: "Le scatter plot positionne Diomandé parmi tous les joueurs à un poste similaire en FRA1 sur deux axes : percentile radar et percentile d'impact estimé. Un joueur en haut à droite est rare — excellent profil ET fort impact.",
    body_en: "The scatter plot positions Diomandé among all similar position players in FRA1 on two axes: radar percentile and estimated impact percentile. A player top-right is rare — excellent profile AND high impact.",
    insight_fr: "Diomandé se positionne dans le cluster Dembélé/Barcola/Doué — le top du marché en L1. Ce positionnement objectif confirme son statut de profil élite à son poste.",
    insight_en: "Diomandé positions in the Dembélé/Barcola/Doué cluster — the top of the L1 market. This objective positioning confirms his elite status at his position."
  }
};

function vfSelect(key) {
  const isFr = !document.body.classList.contains('lang-en');
  const d = VF_DATA[key];
  if (!d) return;
  document.querySelectorAll('.vf-hotspot').forEach(h => h.classList.remove('active'));
  const zones = document.querySelectorAll('.vf-hotspot');
  const keyMap = {profile:0, index:1, radar:2, trajectory:3, scatter:4};
  if (zones[keyMap[key]]) zones[keyMap[key]].classList.add('active');
  if (!document.getElementById('vf-default')) return;
  document.getElementById('vf-default').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('vf-content').style.display = 'block';
  document.getElementById('vf-tag').innerHTML = isFr ? d.tag_fr : d.tag_en;
  document.getElementById('vf-title').innerHTML = isFr ? d.title_fr : d.title_en;
  document.getElementById('vf-body').innerHTML = isFr ? d.body_fr : d.body_en;
  document.getElementById('vf-insight').innerHTML = isFr ? d.insight_fr : d.insight_en;
  if (window.innerWidth < 900) {
    document.getElementById('vf-explain').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth', block:'nearest'});
  }
}

// Scroll animations
const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
  entries.forEach(e => { if (e.isIntersecting) e.target.classList.add('visible'); });
}, { threshold: 0.1 });
document.querySelectorAll('.fade-up').forEach(el => observer.observe(el));
</script>
</body>
</html>
